title: Debt Collector
description:
Prime Recovery LLC is a third-party consumer debt collection agency based in the United States. We operate with strict FDCPA compliance and specialize in the recovery of defaulted installment loan and credit card accounts. 



We are currently hiring a remote Debt Collector who is fluent in English, disciplined, and ready to contribute to a high-performance recovery team.



Job Requirements:

MUST HAVE 3rd PARTY DEBT COLLECTION EXPERIENCE

Fluent spoken and written English

Must be available during U.S. business hours

Stable high-speed internet connection with a STATIC IP ADDRESS

Windows computer (preferably with dual monitors)

Highly organized, able to manage tasks independently

Self-motivated and results-driven

Open to training and coaching to meet performance benchmarks

Must submit a 1–2 minute voice recording introducing yourself in English



Key Responsibilities:

Make outbound calls to consumers regarding overdue installment loans

Document all call results and debtor responses clearly in system notes

Monitor and flag broken promises, skipped payments, or refusals

Assist in reviewing payment arrangements for accuracy and compliance

Locate and verify updated contact information using online tools

Upload and organize call recordings as part of account documentation

Track settlement approvals, payment plan progress, and status updates



This is a long-term position with performance-based incentives. You’ll be part of a serious, compliance-first recovery agency with room to grow and contribute meaningfully to our success.

title: Web Designer (Squarespace / Wix + Figma) – Part-Time (15–20 hrs/week)
description:
We’re a growing digital team made up of graphic designers, frontend and backend developers, and UX designers. We build high-quality websites and digital experiences for therapists and mental health brands.



We’re looking for a web designer to help alleviate and expand our current bandwidth. You’ll be working directly under our Head of Design and collaborating with the rest of the team across different types of projects.



This is a hands-on role focused on real web design and execution, not just social media graphics.



What You’ll Be Doing:

-Build and design websites inside Squarespace and/or Wix

-Assist with layouts, sections, and full page builds

-Support design work in Figma for WordPress and custom-coded projects

-Collaborate with our design team to maintain consistency and quality

-Help with light social content (
s, simple graphics, basic edits if needed)



What This Role Looks Like:



This role can range from:



-Building a full Squarespace or Wix website from start to finish

-Assisting on WordPress or custom projects through Figma design work

-Supporting ongoing design needs across active client projects

-Some projects will be structured, others will require you to think and design independently. The expectation is that you can step in, execute cleanly, and contribute without needing constant direction.



Requirements:

-Experience with Squarespace and/or Wix (required)

-Experience with Figma

-Strong understanding of layout, spacing, and clean design

-Ability to follow direction and also design independently

-Good communication and reliability



Nice to Have:

-Experience with WordPress

-Basic video editing (Reels/TikTok)

-Experience working with agencies or multiple clients



Hours & Pay:



15–20 hours per week

$7/hour

Long-term opportunity for the right person





Important (Read Carefully):



How to Apply (Important)



Please send your application directly to:







1. 2–3 Squarespace or Wix websites you’ve worked on

2. 2–3 design samples (Figma or similar)

3. A short explanation of your role in those projects



Also include the word “FOCUS” at the top of your application so we know you read this.



If your experience is mainly Canva or templates, this role is not a fit.



Business Name:

The Feelings Center – Creative Studio

title: call center agent
description:
Answer inbound calls from prospective and existing patients

Make outbound calls to leads, past patients, and follow-ups

Schedule, confirm, and reschedule appointments

Handle objections and guide patients toward booking appointments

Maintain accurate patient records in CRM/software systems

Follow up on no-shows, missed calls, and unscheduled leads

Coordinate with clinic staff to ensure smooth patient flow

Support sales campaigns, recalls, and marketing initiatives





Responsible for managing denied hearing aid and audiologist claims with commercial payers including BCBS and Aetna. Reviewed EOBs and denial codes, drafts and submits fist and second level appeals, ensures documentation supports medical necessity (degree/type of loss, functional impact and need for binaural amplification), and tracks deadlines and outcomes. Maintains appeal tracking reports and identified denial trends to reimbursement success

title: U.S. Enrolled Agent (EA)
description:
About the Role:

We are seeking an experienced U.S. Enrolled Agent (EA) to support a growing U.S.-based accounting firm. This role is ideal for a tax professional with strong technical expertise in U.S. federal and state taxation who is comfortable working remotely while collaborating closely with a U.S. team.



You will play a key role in tax preparation, compliance, IRS correspondence, and client support during tax season and throughout the year.



Key Responsibilities:

Prepare and review U.S. federal and state tax returns for:

Individuals (Form 1040)

Partnerships (Form 1065)

Corporations (Form 1120 / 1120S)

Trusts and Estates (Form 1041, if applicable)

Analyze financial statements and trial balances for tax preparation

Perform tax research and document findings

Respond to IRS notices and draft professional responses

Assist with tax planning and projections

Support audit representation and IRS communications when required

Ensure accuracy, completeness, and compliance with U.S. tax laws

Communicate with U.S.-based clients and internal staff professionally and clearly

Maintain organized digital workpapers and documentation



Qualifications:

Active Enrolled Agent (EA) credential issued by the IRS

Minimum 3+ years of hands-on U.S. tax preparation experience

Strong knowledge of federal and multi-state taxation

Experience working with U.S. accounting firms (preferred)

Proficiency in U.S. tax software such as:

Lacerte

UltraTax

ProSeries

Drake

CCH (ProSystem fx)

Familiarity with QuickBooks Online/Desktop and financial reporting

Strong English communication skills (written and verbal)

Ability to work during U.S. business hours

Reliable internet connection and dedicated home office setup



Preferred Experience:

Experience supporting high-volume tax seasons

Exposure to U.S. small business clients

Knowledge of bookkeeping and clean-up work

Familiarity with practice management systems (Karbon, Canopy, TaxDome, etc.)

title: PPC Specialist – Amazon Marketing Agency
description:
PPC Specialist – Amazon Marketing Agency (Remote)



Full-Time | Remote | Competitive Salary + PTO



About Us:



The Amazon Whisperer is a fast-growing, full-service Amazon marketing agency that delivers profitable sales growth for consumer brands. We specialize in Amazon SEO, PPC, listing optimization, and catalog management, and we do it with systems, strategy, and speed. We’re looking for a PPC Specialist who wants to grow into a world-class media buyer by executing and managing high-performing Amazon ad campaigns.



The Role:



The PPC Specialist plays a hands-on role in the day-to-day execution of Amazon advertising campaigns. You’ll be responsible for uploading bulk files, adjusting bids and budgets, building campaigns, harvesting keywords, and ensuring PPC performance stays aligned with ACoS, TACoS, and budget targets. This is a perfect fit for someone who wants to master the technical side of Amazon ads and learn how to run efficient, scalable campaigns from the ground up.



You’ll work directly under the PPC Lead, taking direction on strategy while owning the implementation across multiple client accounts.



Responsibilities:



- Work closely with the PPC Lead to implement strategies across client accounts

- Create new campaigns (SP, SB, SD) and restructure existing ones for efficiency

- Adjust bids, update budgets, and modify placement settings

- Harvest high-performing keywords and promote them into new campaigns

- Apply negative keyword targeting to eliminate wasted ad spend

- Track and maintain campaign health daily to ensure accounts remain within budget

- Monitor and flag issues with ACoS, TACoS, or unexpected spend spikes

- Harvest PPC data to support organic SEO initiatives

- Maintain clean data and reports in spreadsheets and tracking tools



Requirements:



- Minimum 2 years of Amazon PPC experience (SEO knowledge is a plus)

- Proficiency in Helium 10, Data Dive, Jungle Scout, or similar keyword tools

- Strong analytical mindset and comfort working with performance data

- Must be proficient in Google Sheets and Excel

- Experience using automated ad platforms like Trellis, Adlabs, Bidx, Teikametrics, Quartile, Perpetua, or other similar sofware

- Clear communication skills for working with team leads and managers

- Reliable and organized, able to manage multiple campaigns without hand-holding

- Fast and reliable internet connection

- Fluent English (written and spoken)

- Ability to type 55+ words per minute



Company Culture:



At The Amazon Whisperer, we highly value transparency, communication, and trust. This is not just another job, it’s a place where your ideas are valued, hard work is rewarded, and growth opportunities are everywhere. We’re building a team that operates like a unit. Supportive, proactive, and relentlessly focused on client success. If you’re looking for a long-term remote role where you can grow your skills and career, you’re in the right place.



What You’ll Get:



- Competitive pay

- 13 days PTO (including public holidays)

- 100% remote work

- Opportunity to grow into roles like PPC Lead and beyond

- A collaborative and growth-minded team environment



Apply today and be part of a company that’s scaling fast and doing things differently in the Amazon space. We’re not looking for average. We’re looking for exceptional.



Submit your application here:

title: Lead Qualification Assistant – Amazon Research
description:
Lead Qualification Assistant – Amazon Research (Remote)

Flexible Working Hours | Remote 



About Us:

The Amazon Whisperer is a fast-growing eCommerce marketing agency helping consumer brands scale profitably on Amazon and other marketplaces. We work with a large volume of brands and rely on clean, accurate data to identify high-potential opportunities.



We’re looking for a detail-oriented Lead Qualification Assistant to help us manually qualify a large list of Amazon seller leads. This is a straightforward, repeatable task and is ideal for someone who is comfortable with spreadsheets, basic research, and working independently.



The Role:

This role is focused entirely on manual lead qualification using a provided spreadsheet and clear instructions.

You will be working through tens of thousands of leads, one by one, and gathering basic data to help us determine whether a brand is worth contacting.

This is not a strategic role and does not require advanced Amazon knowledge — just accuracy, consistency, and reliability.



What You’ll Be Doing:

Open a provided link to a brand’s Amazon store or product listing

Confirm the brand has active products listed on Amazon

Open Helium 10 and:

Check the estimated monthly revenue of products on the first page

Enter required data into a spreadsheet:

Monthly revenue estimate

Confirmation of active products

Any basic notes (if applicable)

Move on to the next lead and repeat the process

Clear SOPs and examples will be provided.





Requirements:

Comfortable working with Google Sheets

Basic familiarity with Amazon product listings

Willingness to follow a repetitive, process-driven task

Strong attention to detail and accuracy

Reliable internet connection

Ability to work independently without constant supervision

Prior experience with Helium 10 is a plus (but not required — guide will be provided)





Pay & Hours:

Flexible hours

Long-term work available due to the large volume of leads

Performance-based continuation (consistent accuracy = ongoing work)



Who This Role Is Best For: 

Entry-level virtual assistants

Anyone looking for simple, stable, process-based work

Detail-oriented individuals who prefer clear instructions and minimal ambiguity

Those comfortable doing repetitive tasks efficiently

description:

About Us:



The Amazon Whisperer is a fast-growing, full-service Amazon marketing agency that delivers profitable sales growth for consumer brands. We specialize in Amazon SEO, PPC, listing optimization, and catalog management, and we do it with systems, strategy, and speed. The Role:



The SEO Cataloging Specialist plays a critical dual role in our agency, driving traffic through SEO and keeping our clients’ Amazon catalogs healthy and optimized. You’ll be responsible for conducting in-depth keyword research, writing listing copy, updating keyword lists, and harvesting terms from PPC to enhance organic rankings. On the cataloging side, you’ll manage suppressed listings, submit reimbursements, upload images, and resolve backend issues with Amazon Seller Support.



This is a hands-on, detail-oriented role for someone who loves data, knows their way around the Amazon backend, and thrives in a fast-paced, remote environment.



Responsibilities:



- Conduct Amazon SEO research and build keyword strategies using tools like Helium 10, Data Dive, and Jungle Scout

- Update and maintain Master Keyword Lists (MKLs)

- Write Amazon listing copy including titles, bullets, descriptions, and backend search terms

- Harvest high-performing keywords from PPC campaigns to integrate into organic strategy

- Track and report on organic keyword ranking performance

- Troubleshoot suppressed listings, stranded inventory, and other catalog issues

- Submit FBA reimbursement claims and follow up as needed

- Manage catalog backend tasks such as uploading images, scheduling promotions, and opening cases with Amazon Seller Support

- Maintain accurate data in tracking sheets and ensure catalog compliance across accounts



Requirements:



- Minimum 2 years of Amazon experience working in catalog management and SEO optimization

- Proficiency with Helium 10, Data Dive, Jungle Scout, and other keyword tools

- Strong copywriting skills and ability to write SEO-friendly listing content

- Fluent English (both written and spoken)

- Extremely organized, reliable, and comfortable working in a fast paced environment

- Ability to type 55+ words per minute

- Fast and reliable internet connection

- Comfort using Google Sheets, Excel, and AI tools like ChatGPT



Company Culture:



At The Amazon Whisperer, we highly value transparency, communication, and trust. This is not just another job, it’s a place where your ideas are valued, hard work is rewarded, and growth opportunities are everywhere. We’re building a team that operates like a unit. Supportive, proactive, and relentlessly focused on client success. If you’re looking for a long-term remote role where you can grow your skills and career, you’re in the right place.



What You’ll Get:



- Competitive pay

- 13 days PTO (including public holidays)

- 100% remote work

- Room to grow into roles like Project Manager, SEO Lead, and beyond

- A collaborative and growth-minded team environment



Apply today and be part of a company that’s scaling fast and doing things differently in the Amazon space. We’re not looking for average. We’re looking for exceptional.



Submit your application here:

title: $8,000 From ONE Partnership - Need Crypto Network, Not Experience (Remote BD)
description:
Job Description:

We’re a DeFi protocol launching game-changing LP bond technology. We need Business Development partners who can introduce us to crypto launchpads, blockchain projects, and DeFi communities.





THE OPPORTUNITY:

Every successful introduction that leads to partnership earns you serious money. One good partnership could net you $5,000-10,000 in your first month.





COMPENSATION:

Monetize your network through three massive income streams: guaranteed ETH salary, instant token unlocks, and recurring commissions. We pay you to open doors you’ve already built, while we handle 100% of the closing.



Guaranteed Base Pay: You will receive $10/hour (capped at 10 hours/week),       for simply activating your network. 50% paid in Ethereum (ETH) for immediate cash and 50% in $GMI tokens, which are subject to an 18-month vesting schedule, building a long-term position in the $GMI mutli-chain ecosystem.



Performance Bonus: Every 5 successful partnership you close triggers an immediate unlock of 20% your vested tokens. This allows you to bypass the 18-month vesting period and access your earnings as soon as you deliver results.

Note: A "successful partnership" is defined by the project signing the LP Bonds integration agreement and going live on our marketplace.



Additional Commission: 

- 25% commission on ALL upgrade fees from your partnerships

- Level 2 upgrades: $40 upgrade fee, you get $10 each

- Level 3 upgrades: $80 upgrade fee, you get $20 each

- Level 4 upgrades: $160 upgrade fee, you get $40 each



-  $500 bonus when your partnerships hit 25 Level 4 bonds

-  $2,000 bonus at 100 Level 4 bonds

-  $5,000 bonus at 300 Level 4 bonds

-  Realistic month 1 earnings: $2,000-5,000

- Total 90-day potential: $20,000+



YOU HAVE:

- Existing connections in crypto (launchpads, DAOs, blockchain projects)

-
/
 relationships with project founders or marketing heads

- Understanding of DeFi/crypto space

- Hunger to earn based on results, not hours





YOU DON’T NEED:

- To close deals (I handle that)

- Any upfront investment

- Previous BD experience (connections matter more)

- Full-time commitment (work your own schedule)





THE ROLE:

Simply introduce me to decision-makers at crypto projects. I close the deals, you collect commissions. Every user from your partnerships who upgrades their bonds puts money in your pocket..

Example: ONE medium-sized launchpad partnership generating 100 L4 bonds = $8,000 for you.



Ready to turn your crypto connections into serious income?



Apply with:

- List 3-5 crypto projects/launchpads you have connections with

- Your
 handle

- Brief description of your crypto involvement



We need partners who see the opportunity and want to run with it. Start earning within days of your first successful introduction!

title: Senior Full-Stack Developer (DeFi and NFT Projects)
description:
About Us

LP Bonds. Live DeFi protocol. 8+ chains. 50+ pools. Real users. Real TVL. We built this with a team most startups would call "impossible." We're not looking for someone who's done 10 years of safe corporate blockchain work. We're looking for someone who's hungry enough to own an entire protocol's technical stack and sharp enough to not break it.



THE ROLE

 You own everything technical. Smart contracts. Frontend. Backend. New chain deployments. DEX integrations. Infrastructure. There's no senior engineer above you to review your code. There's no architect drawing diagrams for you. You are the engineering department.



WHAT YOU'LL DO:

Solidity & Contracts:

- Deploy and manage production smart contracts across EVM chains - Bond NFTs, LP vaults, yield engines, upgrade systems, marketplace

- Ship new chain deployments end-to-end. We hand you a chain, you hand us live contracts.

- Integrate with DEX protocols (Camelot, PancakeSwap, Uniswap) at the contract level

- Security is your religion. You think about how things break before you think about how they work.



Frontend:

- React/Next.js - build and maintain the full user-facing application

- Web3 wallet integrations, stats dashboard, Bond NFT marketplace

- If the UI is broken, it's your problem. If it's slow, it's your problem.



Backend & Infra:

- Node.js API, MongoDB, IPFS

- Multi-chain indexing and event monitoring

- Keep 8+ chain deployments healthy simultaneously



WHO YOU ARE:

- You've written Solidity that's been deployed to mainnet. Even once. Even small. You've felt the weight of real money in your contract.

- You can build a full-stack app alone. Not "I contributed to a team project" - you built it.

- You learn by doing, not by asking. You hit a wall, you Google it, you read the docs, you figure it out, you ship.

- You're not waiting for permission. You see something broken, you fix it. You see something missing, you build it.

- You're young, hungry, and slightly terrified of how much responsibility this is. Good. That fear keeps you sharp.





WE CARE ABOUT:

- What you've shipped. Show us. Links or it didn't happen.

- How fast you learn when thrown into something you've never done

- Whether you take ownership or make excuses

- Whether you stay up until 3am because the bug is bothering you, not because someone told you to



This is a small team building something most of DeFi hasn't figured out yet. You will be stretched. You will ship things you didn't think you could ship. You will learn more here than anywhere else because there's no one to hide behind.



If that excites you, apply. If it scares you, even better - apply anyway.

title: Health Insurance Data and Contracting Support
description:
ABOUT US

We are a growing health insurance agency dedicated to helping individuals and families across the United States find the right health coverage. Our team operates in a fast-paced, remote-first environment where every tea
mber plays a vital role in delivering exceptional service. We are expanding and looking for a talented Virtual Assistant to join our team and grow with us.

WHAT WE OFFER

Competitive hourly pay of $3–$7/hour based on experience, plus commission opportunities.

A clear path for growth — top performers will have opportunities for increased pay, expanded responsibilities, and leadership roles.

Fully remote position — work from anywhere with a reliable internet connection.

A supportive, team-oriented culture where your contributions are valued and recognized.

Hands-on training and exposure to the U.S. health insurance industry, building valuable long-term skills.

POSITION OVERVIEW

We are seeking a detail-oriented Data & Contracting Specialist to manage the backbone operations of our agency. This role is critical to keeping our agent contracting, data fulfillment, invoicing, and administrative systems running smoothly. You will support the agency’s key players by handling essential back-office functions that directly impact growth and profitability.

KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

Manage the full agent contracting lifecycle: process new agent appointments, carrier applications, certifications, and onboarding documentation.

Track and maintain contracting status for all agents across multiple carriers, ensuring timely renewals, compliance, and up-to-date records.

Execute data fulfillment processes including lead data management, list preparation, data segmentation, and delivery to marketing partners.

Manage invoicing for the team and coordinate billing with the agency’s data and marketing company partners.

Maintain and update agency databases, spreadsheets, and CRM records with accuracy and consistency.

Provide administrative support to agency leadership, including scheduling, document preparation, and task management.

Prepare reports on contracting pipeline, data delivery metrics, and financial summaries as requested.

Coordinate with carriers, marketing vendors, and internal tea
mbers to resolve data discrepancies and contracting issues.

REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS

Exceptional attention to detail and organizational skills — you thrive on accuracy and process management.

Strong computer proficiency including advanced skills in spreadsheets (Excel/Google Sheets), CRM platforms, and data management tools.

Experience with invoicing, billing, or basic bookkeeping processes.

Minimum 1–2 years of experience in an administrative, data entry, or operations support role.

Ability to manage multiple priorities and deadlines independently with minimal supervision.

Strong written communication skills for professional correspondence with carriers, vendors, and tea
mbers.

Reliable high-speed internet connection and a dedicated, distraction-free workspace.

PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS

Previous experience in health insurance agent contracting or insurance agency operations.

Familiarity with GoHighLevel (GHL) or similar CRM platforms.

Experience working with carrier contracting portals and appointment systems.

Background in data fulfillment, lead management, or marketing operations.

Experience with invoicing tools such as QuickBooks, FreshBooks, or similar platforms.



HOW TO APPLY

Send your resume along with a brief cover message explaining why you are the right fit for this role. Please include:

• Your relevant experience  • Your availability and time zone  • Your internet speed test results

We are looking for a highly skilled Client Support Specialist to serve as the primary point of contact for our clients after the sale is made. You will be the face and voice of the agency, guiding policyholders through their health insurance benefits, resolving issues, and ensuring an exceptional client experience. This role requires outstanding English communication skills, a professional phone presence, and the ability to navigate the complex U.S. health insurance landscape with confidence.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

Serve as the main point of contact for all post-sale client inquiries via phone,
, and messaging platforms.

Guide clients through their health insurance plans, including coverage details, claims processes, provider networks, and benefit explanations.

Assist clients with enrollment changes, plan modifications, qualifying life events, and annual renewal support.

Troubleshoot and resolve billing discrepancies, claims issues, and coverage questions by coordinating with carriers and internal tea
mbers.

Maintain detailed and accurate records of all client interactions in the agency CRM (GoHighLevel/GHL).

Proactively follow up with clients to ensure satisfaction, policy understanding, and retention.

Escalate complex cases to senior tea
mbers or carriers as needed while keeping clients informed throughout the process.

Stay current on health insurance regulations, ACA guidelines, carrier updates, and plan changes that may impact clients.



REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS

Impeccable spoken and written English — must sound natural, professional, and confident on live calls with U.S.-based clients.

Strong understanding of the U.S. health insurance industry, including ACA/Marketplace plans, Medicare, Medicaid, short-term health, and ancillary products.

Exceptional computer skills with the ability to quickly learn and navigate multiple software platforms simultaneously.

Minimum 1–2 years of experience in a client-facing support role, preferably in the insurance or healthcare industry.

Outstanding problem-solving skills with the ability to handle difficult client situations with professionalism and empathy.

Reliable high-speed internet connection, a quiet workspace, and professional-quality headset for calls.



PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS

Previous experience working in a U.S. health insurance agency or brokerage.

Familiarity with GoHighLevel (GHL) or similar CRM platforms.

Experience with carrier portals such as 
, SHOP, or direct carrier enrollment systems.

Licensed or willing to pursue health insurance licensing (state-specific).



HOW TO APPLY

Send your resume along with a brief cover message explaining why you are the right fit for this role. Please include:

• Your relevant experience  • Your availability and time zone  • Your internet speed test results





We are an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all tea
mbers.

title: Amazon FBA expert, Online Arbitrage, Product Sourcing
description:
We are looking for a skilled and self-motivated Product Sourcing Specialist to join our Amazon FBA business on a part-time basis. 



You NEED to have Keepa & SAS

AMAZON UK



- You will be in responsible for identifying profitable products through online arbitrage — finding inventory across retail and online stores that can be resold on Amazon for a strong return. This is a results-driven role where your impact is directly measurable.

What You’ll Do

 - Research and identify high-ROI products across online retailers, clearance sites, and deal platforms suitable for Amazon FBA resale

 - Analyze pricing, sales rank, competition, and profit margins using tools such as Keepa, Tactical Arbitrage, or similar

 - Evaluate products against key metrics: ROI, BSR (Best Sellers Rank), competition level, and buy box eligibility

 - Submit sourcing leads in a clear, organized format with supporting data

 - Stay current on Amazon policy changes, restricted categories, and IP/brand restrictions

 - Adapt sourcing strategies based on seasonal trends and market shifts

What We’re Looking For

 - Proven experience with Amazon FBA online arbitrage sourcing

 - Strong working knowledge of tools like Keepa, Tactical Arbitrage, Seller Amp, or BrickSeek

 - Ability to independently assess profitability — including fees, shipping costs, and price history

 - Detail-oriented with strong analytical thinking

 - Reliable, self-directed, and able to meet sourcing quotas with minimal oversight

 - Familiarity with Amazon Seller Central is a plus

Why Work With Us

 - Fully remote and flexible hours

 - Performance-based growth opportunities

 - Work with a focused, low-overhead FBA operation that moves fast



Kindly contact me via WhatsApp on: ?+44 7398 852696?

title: Patient Care Coordinator
description:
We are looking for a highly motivated and experienced Remote Patient Services Representative based in the Philippines. The ideal candidate will manage inbound and outbound calls, assist patients with scheduling appointments, address inquiries, and perform other related tasks to ensure a seamless patient experience.



Key Responsibilities:

• Answer incoming calls promptly and professionally.

• Schedule, reschedule, and confirm patient appointments using our electronic health record (EHR) system.

• Provide accurate information regarding services, insurance, and payment options.

• Address patient inquiries and concerns with empathy and efficiency.

• Maintain and update patient records with a high degree of accuracy.

• Collaborate with the optometry team to ensure optimal patient care.



Performance Metrics:

To ensure excellence in patient service, the following performance metrics will be used to evaluate success in this role:

• Average Handle Time (AHT): The average duration of a patient interaction, including talk time, hold time, and after-call work. Efficiently managing AHT ensures timely assistance to patients while maintaining service quality. ?

• Quality Score: Assessment of call quality based on adherence to protocols, accuracy of information provided, and overall patient interaction effectiveness. High-quality scores reflect a commitment to excellence in patient care.

• Patient Satisfaction Score: A measure of patient contentment with the service provided, often gathered through post-interaction surveys. High scores indicate successful patient engagement and issue resolution.

• Service Level: The percentage of calls answered within a specified timeframe, reflecting the ability to meet patient demand promptly. Maintaining a high service level ensures patient satisfaction and loyalty. ?

• Appointment Scheduling Rate: The efficiency and accuracy in scheduling patient appointments, ensuring optimal utilization of clinic time and resources.



Qualifications:

• Proven experience in a customer service role, preferably in a medical or optometry setting.

• Exceptional verbal and written English communication skills.

• Familiarity with EHR systems and medical scheduling software is a plus.

• Strong organizational skills and attention to detail.

• Ability to work independently and manage time effectively.

• Stable internet connection and a quiet workspace conducive to professional phone conversations.



Work Schedule:

• Full-time position.

• Must be available to work U.S. business hours, including potential evening shifts to accommodate different time zones.



To Qualify, please complete the Assessment below:



1. Application form: wkf.ms/45nfpCJ

2. Complete this assessment: 
/link/index/JB-BYUGHNDRC?u=

title: Virtual Assistant – Inbound Call Specialist & Intake Coordinator
description:
Virtual Assistant – Inbound Call Specialist & Intake Coordinator

Robland Home Health Care & Aspen FMS



Position: Virtual Assistant – Phone & Intake Support

Employer: Robland Home Health Care / Aspen FMS

Work Hours: Monday through Friday, 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM Central Standard Time (CST)

Work Type: Remote / Virtual

Role Focus: Inbound phone support, client & employee intake, call transfers

Language Requirement: Fluent, clear, professional English (spoken & written)



About Us

Robland Home Health Care and Aspen FMS are dedicated to providing high-quality in-home care services and financial management support to the individuals and families we serve. Our clients and employees are the heart of what we do, and every phone call is an opportunity to deliver a caring, professional, and seamless experience. We are looking for a reliable, detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to be the friendly, dependable voice on the other end of the line.

Role Overview

The Virtual Assistant will serve as the primary point of contact for all incoming phone calls during business hours. This is a phone-centric role — your core responsibility will be answering calls, handling client and employee concerns with professionalism and empathy, conducting initial intake for new clients and prospective employees, and transferring calls to the appropriate tea
mber when needed. This role is critical to our operations and requires someone who is calm under pressure, well-spoken, organized, and genuinely caring toward the people they speak with.

Key Responsibilities

Inbound Call Handling (Primary Duty)

• Answer all incoming calls promptly, professionally, and with a warm, welcoming tone.

• Serve as the first voice representing Robland Home Health Care and Aspen FMS to clients, families, employees, and prospects.

• Listen actively to callers, identify the purpose of the call, and route accordingly.

• Maintain composure and professionalism on every call, including emotionally sensitive or difficult conversations.

• Keep call volume moving efficiently without making callers feel rushed.

Client Intake

• Conduct initial intake calls with new and prospective clients, collecting accurate personal, contact, and service-related information.

• Explain services clearly and answer basic questions about what Robland Home Health Care and Aspen FMS offer.

• Document all intake information correctly in our systems for handoff to the appropriate team.

• Identify urgent needs and escalate promptly to the correct department or supervisor.

Employee Intake

• Handle inbound calls from prospective employees and caregivers interested in joining our team.

• Collect initial application information, answer basic hiring-process questions, and route qualified leads to the hiring coordinator or HR.

• Provide clear, accurate information about next steps in the application process.

Call Transfers & Routing

• Transfer calls accurately to the correct department, tea
mber, or supervisor.

• Announce transfers professionally, briefing the receiving party on the caller and reason when appropriate.

• Take detailed, accurate messages when a call cannot be connected, and ensure timely follow-up delivery.

• Maintain and follow an updated internal directory and call-routing guide.

Client & Employee Concerns

• Address and de-escalate client complaints and employee concerns with patience, empathy, and professionalism.

• Log concerns accurately and forward them to the correct supervisor or department for resolution.

• Follow up when required to ensure the caller feels heard and the issue is being handled.

• Maintain strict confidentiality regarding all client, employee, and company information.

Required Qualifications

• Fluent English: Near-native or native-level spoken English with a clear, neutral accent and strong listening comprehension. Written English must also be professional and error-free.

• Phone Presence: A warm, confident, professional phone voice. Able to project calm and competence on every call.

• Availability: Must be reliably available Monday through Friday, 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM CST, with no regular scheduling conflicts during these hours.

• Experience: At least 1–2 years of experience in a call center, receptionist, customer service, virtual assistant, or intake coordinator role. Healthcare or home care experience is a strong plus.

• Technology: Comfortable with VoIP phone systems, CRM software, Microsoft Office / Google Workspace,
, and basic data entry. Able to learn new systems quickly.

• Home Office Setup: Quiet, distraction-free workspace; reliable high-speed internet; a working computer; a good-quality USB or wired headset; and a dependable backup power or internet plan.

• Soft Skills: Strong active listening, empathy, patience, multitasking, attention to detail, and the ability to stay organized while managing back-to-back calls.

• Professionalism: Discretion, confidentiality, and a customer-first mindset in every interaction.

Preferred (Nice-to-Have)

• Previous experience working with home health care, home care, assisted living, or FMS (Financial Management Services) agencies.

• Familiarity with HIPAA and basic healthcare privacy practices.

• Bilingual (English/Spanish) ability is a plus but not required.

• Prior remote work experience with a proven track record of reliability.

What Success Looks Like

• Calls are answered quickly (within the first few rings) during all business hours.

• Callers consistently describe the experience as friendly, professional, and helpful.

• Intake information is captured accurately and delivered to the right team without delay.

• Transfers land in the right place, with the right context, every time.

• Client and employee concerns are handled with care and nothing slips through the cracks.

Compensation & Schedule

Schedule: Monday – Friday, 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM CST (40 hours per week)

Location: Fully remote

Pay: [Rate to be discussed based on experience]

Start Date: As soon as possible for the right candidate

How to Apply

To apply, please submit the following:

• An updated resume or CV.

• A short cover letter or note (3–5 sentences) explaining why you’re a good fit for this phone-focused role.

• A voice sample — either a 30–60 second recording of you introducing yourself and answering a sample call in English, or the ability to complete a brief phone screen.

• Your available start date and confirmation that you can commit to the full 9-to-5 CST schedule, Monday through Friday.

Only candidates with strong English fluency and reliable availability during the stated hours will be considered. We’re looking for someone who wants to be a long-term part of our team — if that’s you, we’d love to hear from you.



Robland Home Health Care  •  Aspen FMS

title: ML Engineer / Software Developer
description:
We’re hiring a full-stack LLM engineer to build and scale AI systems for a regulated life-sciences content platform.



This is a hands-on role focused on evaluation systems, retrieval pipelines, observability, and experimentation. You’ll be working across the full stack — from prompt systems and multi-agent orchestration to infrastructure, dashboards, and testing frameworks.



This role is not for surface-level AI users. We’re looking for someone who understands how LLM systems actually work in production — and can build reliable, scalable solutions.



What You’ll Work On



Build and improve LLM evaluation systems (golden sets, regression testing, scoring)

Implement retrieval systems (pgvector, hybrid search, reranking)

Develop multi-agent workflows (chains, retries, structured outputs)

Create observability dashboards (cost, latency, failures)

Run experiments and A/B tests across prompts and models

Ensure accuracy, grounding, and compliance in outputs



Core Requirements



Strong experience with TypeScript / Node.js

Production experience with LLMs (Claude API or similar)

Experience with PostgreSQL / Supabase (RLS)

Familiarity with Edge Functions, async jobs, and deployment (Vercel, Railway)

Strong understanding of prompt engineering, structured outputs, and system design

Experience building or working with evaluation frameworks and testing pipelines



Nice to Have



Experience with tools like Langfuse, Braintrust, Promptfoo

Knowledge of guardrails / safety layers

Familiarity with dashboards (React, Recharts)



This is a long-term role with high ownership. You’ll be building core infrastructure that directly impacts product quality and performance.





Only applicants who applied here would be entertained. Please apply through this link:

title: Senior Customer Support Specialist / Team Lead
description:
About the Role

Charm is hiring a Customer Service Team Lead to support a US-based pool equipment manufacturer specializing in pool pumps and heat pumps. You will be the founding CS hire on this account, which means you're walking into a build-it-as-we-go environment with clear runway to grow a team underneath you as call volume scales.



Your day-to-day centers on inbound phone calls from US customers. Roughly 80% of calls will start as information-gathering: intake the issue, capture the right details in Zendesk, and loop in the client's internal sales, technical, and service teams through Microsoft Teams for live or near-live answers. As the product knowledge base matures over the first 60 to 90 days, you'll transition toward handling more calls end-to-end independently.



This role is ideal for a senior CS professional who wants to anchor a growing account, bring structure to ambiguity, and grow into managing a team.



Key Responsibilities

• Handle inbound customer service calls from US-based customers, primarily covering pool pumps and heat pumps

• Capture and document customer information accurately in Zendesk using existing forms, fields, and macros

• Escalate technical questions through a dedicated Microsoft Teams channel to reach sales reps, technical specialists, and service staff

• Send follow-up responses via
 once answers are gathered, using approved templates and macros

• Flag patterns in customer inquiries to inform knowledge base development

• Maintain high standards for ticket quality, response time, and customer experience

• Collaborate with Charm leadership on SOP refinement and performance reporting

• As the account grows, help interview, onboard, and mentor additional agents



Why This Role

You're coming in as the founding CS hire on this account. We're looking for a self-starter with a strong work ethic who cares about building lasting teams. If you execute, you won't stay solo for long. Charm's goal is to build a team around you over the next 6 to 12 months, and the person who proves out in this seat gets first dibs on leading that team.



If you're interested, please view the requirements and apply here:

title: US Payroll Tax Filing Specialist
description:
We are hiring a U.S. Payroll Tax Filing Specialist to manage payroll tax filing work for multiple client accounts.



This role includes:

- Making sure US federal, state, and local tax accounts are properly set up and maintained 

- Preparing quarterly and annual payroll tax returns

- Monitoring filings, acceptances, acknowledgements, and rejections

- Following up on filing issues and helping resolve them

- Keeping filing records organized and making sure deadlines are met



Requirements:

- Experience with U.S. payroll tax filing

- Good understanding of federal, state, and local U.S. payroll taxes

- Strong attention to detail

- Ability to manage deadlines and multiple client accounts

- Ability to work independently



Preferred:

- Experience with isolved or MasterTax software 

- Experience in a U.S. payroll company, CPA firm, or payroll tax role

- Experience with multi-state payroll tax filings



When applying, send:

- Your resume/CV 

- A short intro

- Your U.S. payroll tax experience

- Payroll/tax systems you’ve used

title: Virtual Assistant – Member Support
description:
We are hiring two experienced Virtual Assistants to support customer communication and conference registration tracking for a U.S.-based professional organization in healthcare.



This is a low-volume, high-responsibility role. We are looking for individuals who communicate clearly, take ownership of their work, and can operate independently without ongoing direction.



Role Overview

You will be responsible for managing a shared
 inbox and tracking conference registrations. This role requires attention to detail, strong written communication, and the ability to follow established processes while using sound judgment.



Work Structure

We use a clear ownership model to avoid confusion and ensure consistency.



You may be assigned to:

Monday–Thursday coverage

Friday–Sunday coverage



On your assigned days, you are fully responsible for the inbox and registration tracking.



Daily expectations:

– Check the inbox a minimum of twice per day

– Respond to
s in a timely, professional manner

– Track and update conference registrations

– Flag anything that needs escalation

– Maintain clear, organized records



Key Responsibilities

- Manage and respond to customer service
s

- Provide clear, friendly, and accurate communication

- Track conference registrations in a shared system

- Maintain a high standard of professionalism in all interactions



Required Qualifications

- Fluent, professional English (written and verbal) with no communication barriers

- Strong attention to detail and organization

- Ability to follow instructions and execute independently

- Friendly, kind, and service-oriented communication style

- Reliable and consistent with daily responsibilities

- Experience with inbox management, customer service, or administrative support



Important

This role requires ownership. If something comes in on your assigned day, you are responsible for handling it or reaching out for help.



Compensation

Mon–Thurs: $300/month

Fri–Sun: $350/month

**Compensation will be based on experience, communication quality, and ability to operate independently.



Tools Used

 platforms (Google Workspace or similar)

Google Sheets or tracking systems



To Apply, please include the following:

A short introduction about your experience with inbox or customer support

A sample of a customer service
 you have written (or write a short response to this scenario):

“A customer is asking for help with a conference registration but is confused about what they purchased.”

Confirm first choice and second choice you are applying for (Mon–Thurs or Fri–Sun)

Your availability and internet reliability



Applications without a writing sample will not be considered.

title: Real Estate Sales & Property Management Assistant (Cold Calling Focus)
description:
Navigate Stays is a growing vacation rental management company focused on helping homeowners maximize their property performance while staying completely hands-off.



We are looking for a motivated and professional individual with experience or interest in real estate and property management, who is comfortable speaking with homeowners and generating new opportunities through outbound calls.



This role is primarily focused on cold calling property owners and offering a brief market overview of their property which you research and generate for them.



Key Responsibilities:



-Cold call property owners

-Offer brief, high-level market insights on their property

-Identify interested homeowners and help schedule follow-up calls

-Track outreach and update CRM or lead lists

-Assist with basic administrative and follow-up tasks

-Support ongoing sales and onboarding efforts



Ideal Candidate:



-Comfortable and confident on the phone

-Strong communication and people skills

-Background or interest in real estate, sales, or property management

-Organized and able to manage follow-ups

-Self-motivated and results-driven

-Previous cold calling or sales experience is a plus

title: UK Company Hiring: US Cold Callers
description:
Hiring 10+ Closers to Help Build Local Business Communities - $1,500-$4,000/Month



**Company:** Start Over Movement Holdings Ltd (Founded by Sir Marco Robinson)



**Location:** Remote - **9:00 PM - 6:00 AM Philippines Time** (8:00 AM - 5:00 PM Mississippi Central Time)



**Type:** Full-time Independent Contractor



---



## The Story Behind Start Over



Sir Marco Robinson is a UK entrepreneur, author, and TV personality who has spent decades helping people rebuild their lives and businesses. He founded Start Over Movement with a simple idea: local business owners should support each other, not compete for the same scraps.



Every Start Over chapter is a community of local business owners who:

- Refer clients to each other, generating real revenue

- Learn marketing and sales directly from Sir Marco

- Get a dedicated commission-only closer assigned to their business

- Meet monthly with an exclusive group (only one business per industry per chapter)



It is not networking. It is a referral engine with a mentor attached. Members pay £1,500 (UK) or $1,500 (US and Canada) per year to be part of it. And the model works - we already have active chapters in Laguna Beach, Tampa Bay, New York, London and Toronto. Mississippi is next.



---



## Why We Need You



We are looking for at least 10 cold caller closers to help launch and fill the Mississippi chapter. This is part of a broader buildout of 100+ closers across all our territories. 10 is a minimum target for Mississippi alone, not a cap - we will hire every qualified closer we find.



The business owners we call are not hostile. They are overwhelmed, under-marketed, and tired of networking groups that do not deliver. When you explain what Start Over actually does - referrals, mentorship, exclusive local representation - the good ones lean in.



Your job is to find them, explain it, and close them on the call. One business per industry means urgency sells itself. Once the plumber in Jackson signs up, no other plumber in Mississippi can join. That is the hook.



---



## What You Will Earn



Commission is simple: **$100 for every $1,500 membership you close.** No cap. Pro-rated on cash collected, full commission once the full membership clears. Paid every Friday via Wise, PayPal or Payoneer.



| Monthly Closes | Commission |

|---|---|

| 15 (modest) | $1,500 |

| 25 (solid) | $2,500 |

| 40 (strong) | $4,000 |

| More | More |



Plus a $15/day base, paid daily, to cover your time while you ramp up and to guarantee you earn something from day one.



---



## The 14-Day Trial



We do not rush this. Your first 14 days are a paid trial:



- $15/day base, paid daily via Wise (for verified work days)

- Full commission on every sale you close during the trial

- **Day 1:** Onboarding, script training, shadowing, pass the roleplay by end of day

- **Day 2 onwards:** Full production with daily minimums

- Live coaching from the Cold Caller Manager throughout

- Roleplay check must be passed on Day 1 before going on real calls Day 2



**Event attendees count too:** Every call you make that leads to someone attending a Start Over event and closing at that event earns you the same $100 commission. Attribution = whoever secured the attendance.



**To continue past day 14, you need to have earned $200 in commissions during the trial.** That is 2 full sales (or more in partial payments / event closes). This gate exists because we invest real time and resources in training you. If you cannot close 2 deals in 14 days, it is not the right fit - for either of us.



---



## What Makes This Role Different



**1. You are not hustling a bad offer.** Start Over is real. Sir Marco is real. Members are paying, showing up, and referring each other. You are selling something that delivers.



**2. You are part of a real team.** We are building out 100+ closers across all territories, but we do it properly. You are not one of thousands dialling into a chaotic floor. You get proper coaching, real territory, clear structure, and a Cold Caller Manager who knows your name and your numbers.



**3. You have a growth path.** Mississippi is the start. As we launch new chapters, top performers get first pick. Build your book with us and grow as we grow.



**4. You get real support.** Cold Caller Manager in twice-weekly coaching sessions. Direct line to Marco Fernandes (Sales Director, 39 years of sales experience). Proven script refined across thousands of calls. Calendar booking, leads, and territory handed to you.



---



## The Daily Reality



Let us be honest about what the day looks like:



- **9:00 PM - 6:00 AM Philippines Time** (8:00 AM - 5:00 PM Mississippi Central Time) - yes, graveyard

- Monday to Friday, five nights a week

- **300 dials or 120 connects minimum per day** from Day 2 (whichever you hit first)

- **10+ event bookings per day** (prospects committed to attend the next Start Over event), OR 1+ direct sale, OR 15+ strong Zoom follow-ups booked

- Log every call in real time on the shared tracker

- End-of-day report to the Cold Caller Manager

- Twice weekly meetings (Tuesdays and Fridays typically)



It is not light work. Cold calling is hard. Graveyard is harder. But it is clear work with clear outcomes, and for the right person it pays better than almost anything else a Filipino remote worker can do.



---



## We Are Looking For Someone Who



**Must have:**

- 2+ years phone sales or closing experience

- **OnlineJobs.ph ID Proof 60+** verified on your profile

- **NBI clearance** (or willingness to obtain within 2 weeks of hire)

- Strong English, clear accent, professional tone

- Real experience closing on the call (not just setting appointments)

- Can commit to 9:00 PM - 6:00 AM PHT graveyard shift, Monday to Friday

- Own Zoom Pro account

- Reliable internet (**25+ Mbps** - speed test screenshot required with application), quiet space, good headset



**Will thrive if you:**

- Have sold coaching, consulting, BNI, networking memberships, or community products before

- Care about what you sell, not just about commission

- Take coaching well

- Can handle "no" all day without losing energy

- Want a long-term role, not a quick gig



---



## Honest Caveats



- The first chapter in every territory is the hardest. List building, market education, all of it.

- Your first week, you may not close. That is normal. Week 2 is where the trial gate lives.

- Mississippi is a smaller market than our other chapters. That means you can cover the whole state, but you will also work the list harder.

- Overnight shifts are tough. Please do not apply if you cannot genuinely commit to the schedule long-term.



---



## Verification and Accountability



We use:

- **TimeProof** (you install on your machine, screenshots and activity tracking)

- **GoHighLevel / Ringover** (dial tracking, call recordings, connect verification)

- **Shared call tracker** (real-time logging)

- **Random call audits** (5+ recorded calls per contractor per day reviewed)



This is not surveillance for its own sake. It is so that:

1. We know you are working the hours you claim

2. You are protected if we ever question your output - the data has your back

3. Coaching can be real, because we can listen to your actual calls



We pay for work verified by these systems. Discrepancies get paid only to the verified level. Clear and fair.



**Zero tolerance for fraud:** Fabricated connects, mouse jigglers or other activity simulators, fake call logs, or dials to deliberately invalid numbers = immediate termination. Pay for fabricated work will be withheld or clawed back. This is the only thing we are strict about. Real closers never have an issue with this.



---



## Termination



Independent contractor. Either party can end the agreement at any time, with or without cause, without notice. We pay for all hours worked and commissions earned up to that point.



---



## Group Interview - Tomorrow



We are hosting a **group interview tomorrow (Saturday) at 7pm Manila time** (12pm UK, 7am Mississippi).



**Zoom link:** 







This is how we meet candidates at scale and make fast decisions. Come ready with:

- Webcam and microphone working

- Professional background and attire

- Ready to do a short live roleplay on a cold call

- Questions about the role



If you cannot attend live, send your application anyway and we will include you in the next round.



---



## How To Apply



Message us through OnlineJobs.ph with:



1. **Name and location**

2. **Internet speed test screenshot** (from speedtest.net - must show 25+ Mbps)

3. **ID Proof score** (60+ required) and NBI clearance status

4. **Short summary of your sales experience** - where, what, for how long

5. **A 2-3 minute voice recording** where you:

   - Introduce yourself

   - Answer this directly: **"Can you do 120 connects per night and close $1,500 deals? Prove it."**

   - Handle this objection
 *"I am already in BNI, why would I need another group?"*

6. **Your earliest start date**

7. **Confirmation that you can work 9:00 PM - 6:00 AM PHT graveyard shift** consistently



No voice recording = we cannot review you. We hire on voice, not paper, for phone sales roles.



---



**Start Over Movement. Building real communities. Paying real money. Looking for one real closer in Mississippi.**



We look forward to meeting you tomorrow.

title: Experienced Cold Caller / Telemarketer for U.S. Insurance Leads
description:
Job Title: Experienced Cold Caller / Telemarketer for U.S. Insurance Leads

Company: DialXpress

Location: Remote

Job Type: Full-time

Shift: U.S. business hours, Monday to Friday

Experience Required: Minimum 2 years cold calling or telemarketing experience



About Us

DialXpress is a U.S.-based outbound calling company serving insurance agencies nationwide. The company focuses on calling x-dates, internet leads, aged leads, former customers, and requotes, with a live-caller model only. DialXpress positions itself as an approved vendor and emphasizes compliant calling, high dial volume, and warm handoffs for quoting.



About the Role

We are hiring an experienced cold caller / telemarketer who knows how to get through lists, handle objections, speak clearly, and generate real conversations with U.S. prospects. This is not an entry-level role. We want someone who is comfortable making high-volume outbound calls, following call flows, updating the CRM properly, and helping produce quote opportunities for insurance agencies.



You will be calling leads provided by the client or campaign, using approved scripts and processes. DialXpress provides the staffing side of the operation, while clients provide the lead data, dialer access, and campaign instructions.



What You’ll Be Doing



Make outbound calls to U.S. leads daily

Work internet leads, aged leads, x-dates, former customers, and requote opportunities

Speak with prospects professionally and confidently

Follow campaign scripts while still sounding natural

Qualify interest and transfer or hand off warm prospects when appropriate

Log call outcomes, notes, dispositions, and follow-up actions correctly

Follow compliance rules and do-not-call procedures

Maintain strong daily activity and productivity standards

Communicate with management about lead quality, objections, and call results



What We’re Looking For



At least 2 years of experience in cold calling, telemarketing, appointment setting, or outbound sales

Strong spoken English with a clear and neutral accent

Confident on live calls

Good objection handling skills

Comfortable with repetitive outbound work and performance tracking

Reliable internet and quiet work environment

Experience calling U.S. consumers or business owners is preferred

Insurance lead calling experience is a major plus

Experience using dialers, CRMs, and call disposition systems is preferred



Important Requirements



Must be comfortable making a high volume of outbound calls daily (400+)

Must follow scripts, compliance rules, and company processes

Must update records accurately after calls

Must show up consistently and be dependable

Must be coachable and open to feedback



What Makes This Role Different



Live-caller environment only

No robocalls

No AI voice

Warm handoff style campaigns when applicable

DialXpress is built around lead engagement and structured follow-up cadence, including immediate engagement and extended follow-up windows.



Compensation



Hourly rate: $2.00-$3.00

Full-time schedule: 9am-8pm EST (9am-5pm EST Early Shift) (12pm-8pm Late Shift)

Start date: ASAP



How to Apply

To apply, send:



Your resume

A short voice recording introducing yourself

A summary of your cold calling / telemarketing experience

Any experience you have with insurance, live transfers, appointment setting, or U.S. outbound calling

Your internet speed and computer setup



Application Screening Question

Please answer these with your application:



How many years of cold calling experience do you have?

Have you called U.S. leads before?

What industries have you called in?

Are you comfortable with high-volume outbound calling every day?

Have you worked with dialers and CRMs before?

What is your expected hourly rate?



If you want, I can turn this into a more aggressive OnlineJobs.ph-style version optimized to attract stronger sales reps instead of general telemarketers.

title: AI-Powered Social Media Manager (VA) | Full-Time | Remote
description:
Are you someone who works smarter, not just harder? Do you know how to leverage AI tools to produce high-quality content at scale — without sacrificing creativity? If so, we want YOU.



???? Position: AI-Powered Social Media Manager – Virtual Assistant

???? Hours: Full-Time (40 hrs/week)

???? Schedule: Monday – Friday | 8:30 AM – 5:00 PM PST

???? Rate: $7.50/hr USD

???? Location: Remote (Overseas Applicants Welcome)



? What Makes This Role Different:

-We manage multiple brands and we move fast. We're not looking for someone who spends half a day crafting a single post. We need a self-starter who has mastered AI-powered workflows to produce compelling content efficiently and at volume — without losing quality.

-If you're still doing everything manually, this probably isn't the right fit. But if you've cracked the code on using AI to speed up your creative process, keep reading.



???? What You'll Be Doing:



-Managing and scheduling content across multiple brand accounts simultaneously

-Using AI tools to rapidly produce graphics, videos, captions, and ad creatives

-Monitoring analytics across brands and adjusting strategy based on performance

-Running and optimizing paid social media ad campaigns

-Keeping each brand's voice consistent while working efficiently across all of them

-Staying ahead of trends and proactively bringing fresh ideas to the table





? Required Tools — You Must Know These:



-Design & Video: Canva, CapCut

-Scheduling & Planning: Loomly, Metricool

-Ad Management: Meta Business Suite

-AI Ad & Content Creators: Creatify.ai, Zeely.ai, Blaze.ai

-AI Assistants: Claude, ChatGPT



These aren't "nice to haves." We expect you to use these tools daily to maximize your output and streamline your workflow.



???? You're Who We're Looking For If You:



-Take ownership of your time and hold yourself accountable

-Can manage content for multiple brands without dropping the ball

-Know how to produce quality content quickly using AI — not spending hours on a single ad

-Are a self-motivated problem-solver who doesn't need to be micromanaged

-Communicate proactively and professionally in English

-Have a reliable internet connection and a dedicated workspace





???? This Is NOT the Right Role If You:



Prefer a slow, traditional content creation process

Need constant supervision or hand-holding

Are not comfortable learning and adapting to new AI tools quickly





? Schedule Note:

This role requires you to be available and online Monday through Friday, 8:30 AM – 5:00 PM Pacific Standard Time (PST). Please confirm your ability to work these hours before applying.



???? How to Apply:



-Subject line must include the word 'Efficient' and your name

-Your resume or CV

-A short video (2–3 min) introducing yourself and explaining how you use AI tools in your current workflow

-Examples of content or ads you've created

-Links to social media accounts or brand pages you've managed

-Interview availability for the next 5 days.

title: Virtual Marketing Coordinator
description:
The nLIVEn Team is an Australian based business executive coaching and management consulting business on a mission to help individuals, teams and organisations unlock their full potential. We work with ambitious people who want real, lasting change — and our marketing needs to reflect that energy.



We're looking for a part-time or full-time Marketing Coordinator with a passion for growing a boutique professional service firm style businesses to join us and help bring more of the right clients into our world.



What you'll do - things like:



- Run our content calendar across LinkedIn, Instagram, and

- Write copy that sounds like us — real, energetic, and value-packed

- Grow and nurture our
 list with campaigns that convert

- Track what's working and double down on it

- Help promote events, webinars, and new offers



You're a great fit if you…



- Have 5+ years in marketing or content — coaching/consulting experience is a big plus

- In your late 20s to early 30s and looking for a great, secure place to settle into the next stage of your career

- Write with personality and can adapt to multiple brand voices quickly

- Take ownership and don't need hand-holding

- Get excited by watching numbers move in the right direction

- Want to be part of something that genuinely helps people



What we offer:



- Flexible part-time or full-time hours — work when it suits you (e.g. 5-9 hours per day, Monday to Friday, with a 1 hour unpaid lunch break)

- A collaborative, high-energy team that's growing fast

- Real ownership of your work — your impact is visible

- Opportunity to grow with the business

- A coaching culture that values and rewards personal and professional learning, growth and development and team achievement 



How to apply: 



- Send us a short intro (3–5 sentences on why you're the one), a link to any work samples or your LinkedIn, and your answer to this question: "What's one underrated marketing tactic that boutique coaching and consulting businesses should be using?"

- Applications without the question answered will not be considered — we want to see how you listen, think and speak (in writing)



The role could start as full-time or grow from part-time to full-time position in the future, or we can add other virtual tea
mbers if you prefer to stay part-time.

This role requires excellent oral and written English communication skills, high attention to detail, and the ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment. The ideal candidate is proactive, organised, and capable of working both independently and as part of a team.

Base remuneration of AUD$5-$10/hour, depending on experience and full time equivalent (FTE).

title: Freelance Web Developer

Work Arrangement
