- Examples of Shopify stores or web projects you’ve worked on

title: UK Company Hiring: US Cold Callers
description:
Cold Caller Closers Wanted (10+ Roles) - Remote - $1,500 to $4,000 Per Month OTE - Start Over Movement



**Company:** Start Over Movement Holdings Ltd (Founded by Sir Marco Robinson)



**Job Type:** Full-time, Remote, Independent Contractor



**Working Hours:** Monday to Friday, **9:00 PM - 6:00 AM Philippines Time (PHT)** = 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM Mississippi Central Time. Graveyard shift, no exceptions.



**Compensation:** $15 per day base + $100 commission per closed sale, uncapped



---



## About Start Over Movement



Start Over Movement is a growing network of local business chapters founded by Sir Marco Robinson. Our members are local business owners who refer business to each other, get marketing advice directly from Sir Marco, and receive a commission-only closer assigned to their business to help them generate more revenue.



Each chapter holds a maximum of 300 members, with only one business allowed per industry per chapter. Membership is £1,500 per year (UK) or $1,500 per year (US and Canada).



**Currently hiring: 10+ closers for Mississippi** (this is our minimum target, not a cap - we will hire every qualified closer we find)



This is part of a broader expansion to 100+ closers across all territories. Other active and upcoming chapters (currently full, expanding, or launching soon, future opportunities):

- Laguna Beach, California

- Tampa Bay, Florida

- New York, New York

- London, United Kingdom

- Toronto, Canada



**Mississippi is where we are growing the team fastest right now.** Strong performers will be prioritised for placement in new territories as they launch.



---



## The Role



You are a cold caller closer. Full cycle sales. You open the call, qualify the business owner, handle objections, and close them into the chapter on the same call where possible. You are not an appointment setter. You are not booking calls for someone else to close. You own the close.



**Close hierarchy (in priority order):**

1. **Close on the call** - sign them up and take payment there and then

2. **Get them to the next FREE event** - Sir Marco attends in person, high conversion environment

3. **Book a Zoom follow-up** - for prospects who need more time



---



## Compensation Structure



### 14-Day Paid Trial



- **$15 per day base**, paid daily via Wise (for verified work days only - see Verification section)

- **Full commission on all sales closed during trial**: $100 USD per closed $1,500 membership, pro-rated on cash collected (example: $750 collected = $50 commission; full $100 once full membership clears)

- **Event attendee rule:** If a prospect you called attends a Start Over event and closes there, you get the full $100 commission. Attribution is based on who made the call that secured attendance.

- Commission paid every Friday, 7 days after sale clears

- Training, onboarding, and live coaching included throughout the trial

- Day 1: Onboarding, script training, shadowing, pass live roleplay by end of day

- Day 2 onwards: Full production on real calls with daily minimums



### Performance Gate to Continue



To keep the role beyond day 14, you must **earn $200 in commissions during the trial period** (equivalent to 2 full closed sales, or more in pro-rated partial payments).



- Hit the gate = ongoing role at $15/day + $100 per sale, uncapped

- Miss the gate = trial ends, final payment settled within 7 days



This gate exists because we want real closers. If you cannot close 2 sales in 14 days with our script, our leads, and our training, this role is not for you.



### Ongoing Role (Day 15+)



- $15 per day base, paid daily via Wise

- $100 commission per closed sale, pro-rated on cash collected

- Commission paid every Friday, 7 days after sale clears

- Payment via Wise, PayPal or Payoneer (your choice)

- **No cap on sales**



### Illustrative OTE (commission only, plus base on top)



| Month | Sales | Commission |

|-------|-------|------------|

| Month 1 | 15 sales | $1,500 |

| Month 2 | 25 sales | $2,500 |

| Month 3+ | 40 sales | $4,000 |



---



## Daily Work Standard



From **Day 2 of your trial onwards** (after Day 1 training and roleplay pass), you must meet ALL of these minimum standards on every working day:



**Daily minimums:**

- **300 dials OR 120 connects per day** (whichever you hit first)

- **10+ event bookings per day** (prospects committed to attend the next Start Over event) OR **1+ direct sale closed** OR **15+ strong Zoom follow-ups booked**



- "Dials" = outbound calls made, verified through our dialler system

- "Connects" = calls of 30 seconds or longer with a live contact (not voi
)

- "Event bookings" = confirmed attendance at the next Start Over event (logged in tracker with contact details)

- Verified via GoHighLevel initially, Ringover shortly after onboarding



This is the bare minimum definition of a day's work. An experienced cold caller hits 300 dials comfortably within 5-6 hours of a 9-hour shift. If you cannot hit either threshold, you either did not work the full shift or did not put in real effort. Either way, the day is not complete.



**Audit and Fraud Prevention:** We audit random recorded calls daily (minimum 5 per contractor). Fabricated connects, dials to invalid numbers, use of mouse jigglers or activity simulation tools, fake call logs, or any misrepresentation of work performed = immediate termination. Pay for fabricated work is withheld or clawed back from future commission.



**Other daily expectations:**

- 5 days per week, Monday to Friday

- Working **9:00 PM - 6:00 AM PHT** (8:00 AM - 5:00 PM Mississippi Central Time)

- Log every call in real time on the shared tracking spreadsheet

- Submit daily report to the Cold Caller Manager at end of shift

- Attend twice-weekly meetings with the Cold Caller Manager



**Graveyard shift warning:** This is a true overnight role from Philippines. You will be working 9pm to 6am, five nights a week. Please do not apply if you cannot genuinely commit to this long-term. People who quit in week 1 because "I didn't realise how hard graveyard is" waste everyone's time.



---



## Payment Verification



Payment is based on hours actually worked, verified by a combination of:

- **TimeProof** (screenshots and activity tracking, you install on your own machine via your OnlineJobs.ph account)

- **Dialler activity** (GoHighLevel initially, Ringover after onboarding)



Any material discrepancy between claimed hours and verified activity will result in payment adjusted to verified levels only.



---



## Termination



This is an independent contractor role. **The Company reserves the right to terminate this engagement at any time, with or without cause, and without notice.** Reasons may include but are not limited to:



- Failing to meet the daily 300 dial / 100 connect minimum

- Failing to hit the $400 commission gate within the 14-day trial

- Misrepresentation of hours, dials, connects, or work performed

- Any other reason at the Company's sole discretion



Upon termination, the Contractor is paid only for verified hours worked and commissions earned on sales closed prior to termination.



---



## What We Provide



- Full proven cold calling script (refined across thousands of calls)

- Complete training and onboarding programme

- Leads and assigned territory

- Booking link and calendar setup (handled by our team)

- Dialler access (GoHighLevel, transitioning to Ringover)

- Shared tracking spreadsheet for call logging

- Twice-weekly coaching meetings with the Cold Caller Manager

- Direct reporting line into Marco Fernandes (39 years of sales experience, Sales Director)

- Support from the wider Systemise & Sell team



---



## What You Need



**Required:**

- Minimum 2 years phone sales experience (cold calling and closing)

- **OnlineJobs.ph ID Proof 60+** verified on your profile

- **NBI clearance** (or willingness to provide within 2 weeks of hire)

- Fluent English with a clear, neutral accent

- Ability to work full 9:00 PM - 6:00 AM PHT graveyard shift, five nights a week

- Reliable laptop, headset and stable internet (**minimum 25 Mbps** - speed test screenshot required with application)

- **Own Zoom Pro account** (required for follow-up Zoom calls)

- Quiet, professional environment with no background noise

- Willingness to be recorded on every call for quality and coaching

- Ability to pass a live roleplay before going live on real calls

- TimeProof installed and running during all paid hours



**You will thrive if you:**

- Have closed high-ticket offers ($1,000+) before

- Have B2B sales experience, especially with small business owners

- Are competitive and motivated by uncapped commission

- Take coaching well and apply feedback fast

- Can handle rejection without losing 
ntum

- Have experience selling coaching, consulting, BNI, networking groups or community memberships (bonus)



---



## Who This Is NOT For



- Appointment setters (this is full cycle closing)

- Part-timers who want 2 to 3 hours a day

- Anyone who cannot commit to 300 dials or 120 connects per day, plus 10+ event bookings or equivalent conversion output

- Anyone uncomfortable being recorded or logging every call in real time

- Anyone who has not closed a sale on the phone before

- Anyone unwilling to work Mississippi Central Time business hours (overnight from Philippines)



---



## Contract Terms



- Independent contractor agreement (you are not an employee)

- Governed by the laws of England and Wales

- 12 months non-solicit clause

- 2 years confidentiality clause

- Termination at will by either party, with or without cause, without notice

- Contractor covers own taxes in their country of residence



---



## How To Apply



Send us:



1. **Your full name and current location**

2. **Internet speed test screenshot** (from speedtest.net - must show 25+ Mbps download)

3. **OnlineJobs.ph ID Proof score** (must be 60+) and confirmation you have or can obtain NBI clearance

4. **Confirmation that you can work 9:00 PM to 6:00 AM PHT graveyard shift** consistently, Monday to Friday

5. **A voice recording (2 to 3 minutes)** answering:

   - **"Can you do 120 connects per night and close $1,500 deals? Prove it."** - tell us about your biggest closes and how you would hit the numbers

   - Walk us through how you would handle this objection: *"I don't have time for another networking group."*

6. **Your earliest start date**



Upload the voice recording to Google Drive, Dropbox or attach as an audio file.



**Incomplete applications will not be reviewed.** The voice recording is how we filter for serious closers. If you cannot record a 3-minute voice note, you are not the right fit for a phone sales role.



---



## GROUP INTERVIEW - TOMORROW



We are running a **group interview tomorrow (Saturday) at 7pm Manila time** (12pm UK time, 7am Mississippi Central time).



Zoom link: 







Serious applicants should:

1. Send your application (name, location, voice recording, start date) via OnlineJobs.ph message BEFORE the interview

2. Attend the group interview with your webcam on and a professional setup

3. Be ready to do a live cold call roleplay on the call



This is a hard filter. If you cannot make 7pm Manila tomorrow, send your application anyway and we will consider you for the next round, but priority goes to those who attend live.



---



**Start Over Movement. Remote first. Performance based. Real money for real closers.**

title: Lead to Lease Specialist
description:
Lead to Lease Specialist



Job Type: Available for Full time and Part time role

Work Hours: Monday to Friday, an 9-hour shift including a 1-hour break (8-hour working shift, time zone to be finalized)

Salary: $1,000 per month (Full time) | $500 per month (Part time)



Job Overview: 

We are seeking a confident and driven Lead to Lease Specialist to manage inbound inquiries and proactively engage prospective residents through outbound calls. In this role, you will play a key part in converting leads into scheduled property tours by delivering a seamless and informative experience. 

The ideal candidate is highly comfortable on the phone, possesses strong communication skills, and can clearly explain the self-guided showing process while building rapport and a sense of urgency with prospects. This position requires a proactive approach, attention to detail, and the ability to effectively nurture leads throughout the leasing journey to support occupancy goals.

This role is ideal for a driven leasing professional who thrives in a fast-paced, performance-based environment and is motivated by turning leads into qualified applicants.



* Key Responsibilities:

Serve as the primary point of contact for all inbound leasing inquiries (phone,
, and online leads)

Make outbound calls to new and existing leads to increase tour scheduling and application conversions

Respond promptly to new leads and follow up consistently to drive engagement

Qualify prospective residents based on rental criteria and property fit

Clearly explain the self-showing process and assist prospects with scheduling tours

Maintain accurate lead tracking and notes within company systems

Collaborate with Property Managers and Marketing to ensure alignment on availability and listing details

Follow up with prospects after tours to encourage applications



* Performance Expectations:

Success in this role is measured by conversion metrics, specifically:

Leads converted to scheduled tours

Tours converted to completed applications



* Required Skills & Qualifications:

Prior property management or leasing experience required

Experience with AppFolio (required)

Familiarity with Rently and Tenant Turner (preferred)

Comfortable handling both inbound and outbound calls

Strong phone presence with the ability to build rapport quickly

Clear, professional communication skills

Goal-oriented with a strong focus on conversion and results

Highly organized with strong follow-up discipline



* Nice to Have

Experience in a lead-to-lease or leasing conversion-focused role



Note: An NBI or police clearance will be required upon acceptance of the job offer.

title: Amazon International Marketplace Specialist
description:
******TO BE CONSIDERED AS AN APPLICANT, PLEASE SUBMIT YOUR MOST UP-TO-DATE RESUME AND A VIDEO INTRODUCTION TAILORED TO THIS JOB POSTING!******



Amazon International Marketplace Specialist



Job Type: Full-Time 

Work Hours: Monday to Friday, 7:00 AM - 4:00 PM PST, with a 1-hour break

Salary: $1000 per month



Job Overview: 

We are seeking an experienced Amazon International Marketplace Specialist to oversee and grow our presence across Amazon’s global marketplaces. This role requires hands-on experience managing Amazon Seller Central accounts, driving sales growth, and optimizing operations across multiple regions. The ideal candidate is analytical, detail-oriented, and has a proven track record of successfully navigating international e-commerce environments.



Key Responsibilities:

Manage day-to-day operations of Amazon accounts across international marketplaces (e.g., US, UK, Germany, Japan, Canada, etc.).

Develop and execute strategies to increase sales, improve conversion rates, and enhance product visibility internationally.

Optimize product listings for SEO, content, and localized messaging in different markets.

Monitor inventory levels, forecast demand, and coordinate with supply chain and fulfillment partners.

Analyze sales performance, customer reviews, and competitor activity to inform strategy.

Implement Amazon advertising campaigns (Sponsored Products, Sponsored Brands, etc.) to maximize ROI.

Ensure compliance with Amazon policies, international trade regulations, and local laws.

Collaborate with marketing, logistics, and product teams to execute promotions and launches.



Qualifications:

3-5 years of proven experience managing Amazon accounts in one or more international marketplaces.

Strong knowledge of Amazon Seller Central, Vendor Central, and related tools.

Demonstrated experience with Amazon SEO, advertising, and account optimization strategies.

Analytical mindset with the ability to interpret data and make informed decisions.

title: Remote Structural Engineer / Revit Modeler
description:
******TO BE CONSIDERED AS AN APPLICANT, PLEASE SUBMIT YOUR MOST UP-TO-DATE RESUME AND A VIDEO INTRODUCTION TAILORED TO THIS JOB POSTING!******



Remote Structural Engineer / Revit Modeler



Job Type: Full-Time

Work Hours: Sunday to Thursday, 2:00 PM-10:30 PM PST (30-minute unpaid break) - Subject to client requirements

Salary: $1,200 per month



Job Overview:

We are seeking a highly skilled Structural Engineer / Revit Modeler to join our team. This role focuses on designing and detailing multi-level storage buildings, which require a unique structural approach due to their heavy load-bearing systems and specialized construction methods.

The ideal candidate is not only a strong structural engineer but also a super expert in Revit modeling, capable of creating precise, complex models with minimal supervision.



Key Responsibilities:

Design and model heavy, multi-level storage buildings using Revit.

Perform structural analysis and detailing specific to high-load industrial and storage facilities.

Develop accurate construction documents and shop drawings.

Collaborate with the engineering and design team to ensure models meet structural and architectural requirements.

Identify and solve design challenges with a focus on constructability and safety.

Maintain accuracy and consistency across all Revit models and related documentation.

Coordinate with project managers and other disciplines to ensure seamless project delivery.



Qualifications:

Bachelor’s degree in Structural Engineering, Civil Engineering, or related field.

Industrial and commercial engineering experience preferred, particularly with heavy load-bearing structures.

Proven expertise as a Revit Modeler, with advanced knowledge of large-scale modeling.

Strong understanding of structural systems, especially for multi-level and heavy storage buildings.

Ability to work independently with minimal supervision.

Excellent attention to detail and problem-solving skills.

Strong communication and collaboration abilities in a remote team environment.



Preferred Skills:

Experience with Steel Structures, Concrete Structures, Masonry Construction, Light and Gauge Steel Structures

Familiarity with BIM coordination and clash detection.

Knowledge of U.S. building codes and standards is a plus.

Knowledge of ETABS and SAFE is a plus.



Note: An NBI or police clearance will be required upon acceptance of the job offer.

title: Entry-Level Cold Caller / Opener / Lead Generator – No Experience Needed!
description:
Position: Remote Cold Caller / Opener / Lead Generator – Start Your Sales Career Today

Company: Catalyst– Fast-Growing Marketing & Funding Company (US-based)

Location: 100% Remote (Philippines – perfect for home-based workers)

Type: Full-Time or Part-Time ( flexible shifts to match US hours)

Pay Structure (Real Earnings Potential):



Base Pay: $1.00 per hour (steady while you learn)

App Bonus: $2.00–$3.00 per qualified booked appointment (your main money-maker!)

Funding Bonus: Extra cash bonuses when your leads close and get funded (top performers add hundreds or even $1,000s/month)



What This Job Is About

No cold calling experience? No problem! We're a dynamic marketing and funding company. You'll be our frontline opener: dialing individuals who might need fast funding for inventory, payroll, marketing, or growth. Use our proven scripts, overcome simple objections, qualify them quickly, and book them for our expert closers. It's high-volume outbound calling — the more you dial and book, the more you earn!

This is perfect if you're:



New to sales but willing to learn and grind

A fast learner with good English and a positive attitude

Looking to build real sales skills in finance/marketing

Motivated by bonuses (many of our team started at entry-level and now earn big!)



Your Daily Wins



Make outbound cold calls (100–200+ per shift) using our easy dialer system

Follow simple scripts to pitch MCA cash advances and credit lines

Chat with business owners (restaurants, shops, contractors, online sellers, etc.)

Ask quick questions to qualify (revenue, needs, etc.)

Book qualified appointments/transfers for our funding team

Log calls and results

Hit fun daily targets to unlock bonuses



Requirements – Super Beginner-Friendly



No experience necessary – we'll train you step-by-step!

Clear English speaking (phone-friendly accent is great)

Reliable high-speed internet, quiet workspace, headset, and laptop/PC

Positive mindset — rejection is normal, persistence wins here

Available for US time zone shifts (e.g., PH morning/evening overlap with EST/PST)

Honest, hardworking, and excited to earn more through performance



Why You'll Love It Here



No experience? No issue — we hire attitude over resume

Work from home in your PJs — total freedom

Weekly or bi-weekly payouts so you see money fast

Uncapped bonuses — hustle hard and your paycheck grows fast

Real career path: Start as a cold caller ? become an opener ? move to closer roles

Supportive team with scripts, training calls, and tips from pros

Help US businesses grow while building your own income



Ready to start dialing and stacking bonuses? Apply today!

Send your resume (or just tell us about yourself), a quick 20–30 second voice recording introducing yourself, and why you're excited about sales/funding.
 to [your hiring
] or apply via [link/DM].

Let's get you booked and paid — spots fill up quick for motivated starters!

title: CONTENT CREATOR (ADVERTISING FOCUS) – REMOTE
description:
ABOUT HELPING HANDS FINANCIALS



Helping Hands Financials is a growth-focused financial services company dedicated to helping individuals improve their financial standing and create better opportunities for their future. We operate with purpose, speed, and a strong commitment to delivering real results for our clients.



Our culture is built on accountability, continuous improvement, and execution. We value tea
mbers who take ownership, stay coachable, and focus on measurable outcomes—not just activity.



We are not just running ads—we are building a scalable advertising engine that drives meaningful impact. If you thrive in a fast-paced, results-driven environment and want your work to directly matter, this role is for you.

As a Content Creator (Advertising Focus), you will play a key role in improving our advertising performance. Your main responsibility is to create high-converting video and static ad content for
 and Instagram.



This is a performance-driven role—your work will be measured based on results, specifically how effectively your content generates customer appointments.

Strategy & Creative Development



Research winning ad angles, hooks, and strategies that drive action

Write scripts for short-form video ads 
 & Instagram)

Continuously generate and test new content ideas

Prepare scripts and briefs for leadership recording sessions



Performance & Optimization



Focus on lowering Cost Per Appointment (CPA)

Stay updated on trends, algorithms, and competitor strategies

Work closely with leadership to align content with campaign goals



WORK SETUP

Remote-first role

High autonomy and accountability

Direct collaboration with leadership

Output feeds directly into ad campaigns and scaling efforts

COMPENSATION & EARNING POTENTIAL



Base Salary:

$700/month (first 90 days)

$800/month (after 90 days)

+$50/month increase annually starting Year 2



Monthly Performance Bonus (Based on CPA):

Under $90 CPA  $500

$90–$100 CPA $400

$100–$110 CPA  $300

$110–$120 CPA  $200

$120–$130 CPA  $100



The better your content performs, the more you earn.



BENEFITS & PERKS

Quarterly performance bonus ($300 per quarter after probation)

10 PTO days per year (after 90 days)

Paid U.S. holidays

Long-term growth and mentorship

Exposure to high-level advertising strategies

Performance-based career growth



REQUIREMENTS



Core Requirements:



Strong understanding of
 & Instagram advertising

Ability to create content that drives conversions (not just looks good)

Strong research and scripting skills

Understanding of hooks, angles, and call-to-action strategies

Reliable internet and personal computer

Strong communication and accountability



Preferred:



Experience with Meta Ads

Background in direct-response marketing

Experience creating ad creatives

HOW TO APPLY (IMPORTANT)



To ensure attention to detail, you must include the exact message below when applying:



“I have read and understand the details and would like to submit my resume for consideration.”



Applications without this exact message will not be reviewed.

title: Chief of Staff to CEO – Execution and Leverage (Remote)
description:
Chief of Staff to CEO – Execution and Leverage (Remote)



Aureus Financial is scaling at over 100% year on year across nine business divisions. We are building toward a $100M group and are seeking a Chief of Staff to act as the CEO’s execution partner during this next phase of growth.



This is not a traditional Executive Assistant role. You will be taking over from a task-oriented EA model and stepping into a significantly higher-impact position. The expectation is ownership, judgment, and execution leadership.



*Do not apply if you cannot provide proof of at least 5 years experience in similar roles - unqualified applications will be ignored*



You will run the CEO’s inbox and calendar because that is where priorities are created or destroyed. But your real job is to convert strategy into shipped outcomes, create clarity across teams, and ensure nothing critical stalls due to lack of structure or follow-through.



If you have at least 5 years experience working closely with fast-paced founders or executives in high-growth environments, you will recognise the pace and responsibility immediately. If you are looking for a predictable, task-driven support role, this will not be a fit.



What You Will Own

CEO inbox and calendar as strategic tools. Execution cadence for CEO priorities. Project tracking, accountability, and delivery across divisions. Systems that create visibility and reduce friction. Follow-through on strategic initiatives and commitments.



How Success Is Measured

CEO trust and satisfaction at 9/10 or higher. CEO priorities moving forward without repeated follow-up. Increased CEO focus on strategy and growth. Faster execution and cleaner accountability across teams.



You Are Likely a Fit If

You have operated in a high-growth business. You think in systems and frameworks. You communicate clearly and decisively. You are comfortable pushing back and making judgment calls. You care deeply about outcomes and execution quality.



You Are Not a Fit If

You identify primarily as a task-based EA. You need detailed instructions to take action. You avoid accountability or difficult conversations. You prefer slow-moving, highly structured environments.



How to Apply



Review the job post - 



Submit your CV and a 2-3 minute Loom introducing yourself and explaining: What does an A+ week look like in this role, and how would you run the CEO office in your first 30 days?



Do not apply via OnlineJobs.



Applicants who do not complete the application requirements or send a generic application will not be considered.

title: Full-Stack Developer (Next.js/Supabase) – AI-Augmented Development & CRM Feature Expansion
description:
I am looking for a skilled Full-Stack Developer to continue the development of iOpt_CRM, a custom CRM solution. This project was built using Claude Code (Anthropic’s CLI tool), and I am looking for a developer who is comfortable working with AI tools to maintain and expand the codebase rather than performing a manual rewrite.



I value speed and efficiency. This project utilizes AI for rapid prototyping and feature deployment. Your role is to act as the "pilot"—using AI tools (Claude Code, Cursor, or GitHub Copilot) to generate code, while providing the expert oversight to ensure security, performance, and logical consistency.



Key Responsibilities

Feature Development: Build out new modules (Leads, Pipeline management, Reporting) within the existing framework.



AI Orchestration: Use AI coding assistants to accelerate development while ensuring the output matches the existing project structure.



Database Management: Manage and optimize Supabase (PostgreSQL) schemas, Row Level Security (RLS), and edge functions.



UI/UX: Implement clean, responsive interfaces using Tailwind CSS and shadcn/ui.



Code Quality: Review AI-generated code for technical debt and ensure it integrates seamlessly with the current architecture.



Required Skills

Frameworks: Next.js (App Router), React, and TypeScript.



Backend/Auth: Supabase (PostgreSQL, Auth, Storage).



Styling: Tailwind CSS and shadcn/ui components.



Tooling: Experience with Claude Code, Cursor, or deep proficiency in prompting AI for complex coding tasks.



Git: Strong version control habits.

title: Construction CAD Technician/Project Engineer
description:
PLEASE READ & FOLLOW THE INSTRUCTIONS:

If you're ready to take the next step in your construction career, we want to hear from you! To apply, don’t forget to follow these steps:

1.
 with 'HIRE ME - CAD Technician/Project Engineer' in the subject line and send to " 

2. Attach your updated Resume/CV in PDF format, detailing your work history.

3. Include a portfolio showcasing your work.

4. Record a one-minute Intro Video addressed to WBC, highlighting your background, skills, and relevant experiences.

5. Provide contact information for 2 professional references, including their Full Names, Job Positions, Relationships, working Philippine contact numbers, Date and Time of Availability.



Job Description:

As a Construction CAD Design/Project Engineer, you will play a vital role in ensuring the smooth operation of our construction projects by managing the procurement process. Your responsibilities will include:



1. Creating Submittal Logs: Develop and maintain comprehensive submittal logs to track the submission and approval of all project-related documents.

2. Creating Work Orders: Generate accurate and detailed work orders for subcontractors and suppliers, ensuring all necessary information is included.

3. Creating RFI Logs: Maintain a detailed Request for Information (RFI) log, ensuring all queries and responses are accurately recorded and communicated.

4. Creating accurate Cabinet and Shop Drawings

5. Vendor Management: Identify, evaluate, and manage relationships with suppliers and subcontractors to ensure the timely delivery of high-quality materials and services.

6. Cost Management: Monitor and control project costs by negotiating favorable terms with suppliers, managing budgets, and ensuring cost-effective procurement practices.

7. Inventory Management: Oversee the inventory of construction materials and equipment, ensuring adequate stock levels and minimizing waste.

8. Compliance and Documentation: Ensure all procurement activities comply with relevant regulations and standards. Maintain accurate and up-to-date procurement records and documentation.

9. Collaboration: Work closely with project managers, site superintendents, engineers, and other tea
mbers to align procurement activities with project timelines and requirements.

10. Continuous Improvement: Identify opportunities to improve procurement processes and implement best practices to enhance efficiency and effectiveness.

11. Highly efficient at taking notes during meeting.



Requirements:

- A bachelor’s degree in engineering, architecture, supply chain management, or a similar field is preferred.

- Minimum of 4 years experience in the construction industry.

- Proven experience in construction coordination or a related role.

- Exceptional attention to detail and accuracy to ensure there are no mistakes in procurement activities.

- Strong organizational and time-management skills.

- Excellent negotiation and communication skills. Must be fluent in English (verbal and written).

- Proficiency in procurement software and tools.

- In-depth knowledge of construction materials, equipment, and industry standards.

- Ability to work independently and as part of a team in a fast-paced environment.



Please be advised that only candidates who have submitted the specified requirements will be considered in this position.

title: Operations Coordinator
description:
About LineGear

LineGear supplies PPE, uniforms, and equipment to fire departments and wildland firefighters across California. Our customers include municipal fire departments, state agencies, and individual firefighters.

LineGear serves government fire agencies and operates in a compliance-sensitive procurement environment where accuracy in PO documentation and vendor records is critical.

This role is best suited for candidates who enjoy operations, organization, and managing order workflows.



Role Overview

The Operations Coordinator owns the operational workflow of orders and vendor purchasing, ensuring orders move efficiently through Quote  >  Sales Order  >  Purchase Order.

This role supports the sales team by ensuring orders are processed accurately, vendors are coordinated, and operational systems remain organized and audit-ready. The position is primarily internal operations and does not require phone support.



Key Responsibilities

Sales Order Processing

Manage incoming customer orders and ensure they are processed correctly, with same-day entry as the target SLA. Responsibilities include:

- Creating and updating sales orders

- Verifying order quantities, details, and inventory availability

- Identifying items requiring purchase orders



Uniform Order Processing

Monitor the inbox 
 include:

- Reviewing incoming uniform orders and entering them into the uniform tracking spreadsheet

- Verifying quantities, checking inventory availability

- Creating purchase orders when items are not in stock

- Tracking vendor shipments through to fulfillment



Purchase Order Management

Create and send purchase orders to vendors in accordance with the authority guidelines. 

Additional responsibilities include:

- Reviewing sales orders for inventory shortages before issuing POs

- Confirming vendor receipt of each PO

- Recording expected ship dates and tracking numbers

- Monitoring backorders and flagging delays

- Purchase orders should generally be created only against confirmed sales orders, unless instructed otherwise by management.



Vendor Coordination

Communicate with vendors regarding order status and shipments. Vendor follow-up should occur within 3 business days of any open item. Tasks include:

- Confirming PO receipt and requesting shipment updates

- Recording tracking numbers and monitoring vendor lead times

- Escalating vendor delays to the manager via Slack, Teams, or daily
 update



Vendor File & Data Management

Maintain accurate vendor information across company systems, including:

- Vendor contact lists and pricing lists

- Product catalogs and vendor lead time notes

- Vendor information should be organized within QuickBooks vendor records, shared Google Drive folders, and internal pricing spreadsheets.



Order Status Research

Assist the internal team with order status inquiries. Tasks include:

- Checking inventory availability and verifying vendor shipment status

- Confirming expected delivery dates and providing internal updates to the team



Product & Pricing Data Maintenance

Maintain internal product data to support quoting and purchasing:

- Updating vendor pricing, maintaining SKU data, organizing product information

- Tracking vendor lead times and flagging changes



SOP Documentation

Create and maintain written standard operating procedures (SOPs) for all recurring tasks within this role. Responsibilities include:

- Documenting step-by-step workflows for order entry, PO issuance, vendor follow-up, and uniform order processing

- Updating SOPs when processes change

- Maintaining SOPs in a shared Google Drive folder accessible to the manager

- SOP documentation ensures operational continuity and is a standing expectation of the role, not a one-time task.



Tools Used

The Operations Coordinator will work primarily in:

QuickBooks Desktop (accessed via Remote Desktop — see required skills)

Google Sheets and Google Drive

Shared
 inboxes

Slack and/or Microsoft Teams



Work Schedule

Part-time position, at least 20 hours per week, overlap with U.S. Pacific Time business hours.



Location                       Hours

Philippines                   Approximately 12:00 AM – 8:00 AM PHT

California (PT)              Approximately 8:00 AM – 4:00 PM PT



Exact hours may vary slightly depending on operational needs.



Required Skills

QuickBooks Desktop experience — required. Candidates with QuickBooks Online experience only will need to demonstrate ability to learn QBD quickly. Access is provided via Remote Desktop; a stable, high-speed internet connection is required.

Strong written English

Excellent attention to detail

Strong spreadsheet skills (Excel or Google Sheets)

Ability to follow and document structured processes

Ability to manage multiple tasks and open orders simultaneously



Preferred Experience

Candidates with experience in the following areas are preferred:

Operations coordination, procurement, or purchasing

Logistics support or order management

Inventory tracking in a distribution or product-based business

B2B or government procurement environments



Compensation & Reporting

Starting compensation: $400/month

This role reports directly to Owner



Application Instructions

To confirm that you carefully read this job description, please include the word:



FIRELINE

in the first sentence of your application. Applications without this word may not be reviewed.



Send your application to 
 and answer the following questions in your
 and attach a resume for review.



1. Why are you the perfect fit for this role? Please include any examples of your previous work or projects that demonstrate your expertise.

title: People & Culture Leader
description:
If you run HR by waiting to be told what to do, this is not for you. We need someone who walks into ambiguity and builds order.



About the Role

Aureus Financial is a multi-division financial services and education group serving seven and eight-figure business owners across Australia. We have a team of 65-plus people across education, wealth advice, accounting, mortgage broking, and property. We move fast, hold high standards, and we are scaling.



We have split our HR function into internal and external. This role owns internal HR completely. Within 30 to 60 days of you starting, you will hire a People & Culture Coordinator who handles execution. Your job is to build the system, lead that person, and partner with our department heads to embed performance culture across the business.



Performance management at Aureus is a collaboration. You design the framework and the cadence. Department heads run the conversations with their teams. You hold them accountable to the schedule and the standard. This is the model — you need to be able to build it and make it stick without being heavy-handed.



Why This Role Is Worth Your Time

You will own the entire internal HR function — full design authority, no one telling you how to structure it.

You will hire and lead your own direct report within 60 days — this is a people leadership role, not a solo operator role.

Direct access to the CEO and Group Operations Leader from day one.

You will build the performance infrastructure for a growing business and get to see it work at scale.

PHP 100,
,000 per month, based on experience + performance bonus



What You Will Own

Pillar 1 — Team Leadership & HR Systems

Hire and lead a People & Culture Coordinator within your first 60 days

Design every HR process so it is a documented, repeatable system your Coordinator can run

Own compliance across all HR platforms and employment documentation



Pillar 2 — Talent Acquisition & Performance Framework

Accountable for all hiring outcomes — your Coordinator handles execution, you set the standard

Build the monthly performance review framework and partner with department heads to run it — they own the conversations, you own the system

Design KPI scorecards for every role and train department heads to use them



Pillar 3 — Culture & Strategic Leadership

Engagement initiatives measured by retention and satisfaction scores — not activity

Workforce planning and succession with the executive team

Act as trusted advisor to department heads on people challenges



How We Measure Success

P&C Coordinator hired and operating within 60 days

Monthly performance review cycle running across all divisions with department heads facilitating

Roles filled in under 30 days, every time

Friday Self Assessment completion above 90% with weekly trend reports actioned

Zero employment compliance breaches

Employee satisfaction above 4 out of 5 on quarterly surveys



This Role Is For You If

You have led HR in a 65+ person, multi-entity, fast-moving environment and thrived without hand-holding

You have built HR frameworks from scratch and then trained others to run them

You are comfortable influencing department heads who do not report to you

You know how to hire well — and can build a process that finds A-players consistently

You measure your work by business outcomes: retention, review completion, time-to-fill — not activity



This Role Is NOT For You If

You want to be the one running every review, handling every HR ticket, and staying in execution permanently

You have not been a HR leader in a 65+ person organization

You struggle to influence stakeholders who do not report to you

You have never led or managed a direct report

You have only maintained HR systems — never designed one from the ground up

You need to be told what to work on each week



Base Salary: PHP 100,
,000php per month + bonus

Work Style: Fully remote

Hours: Aligned to Australian business hours (AEST/AEDT)

Reports To: Group Operations Leader



We use VideoAsk for initial screening. Do not send a CV
.

You will be asked to complete a short async video screening (6 questions, approximately 15 minutes). Instructions will be sent after you express interest via our careers page or the link provided. 



Applications submitted via OnlineJobs or without a completed VideoAsk will not be reviewed.



To apply, please click on this link:

title: Quantity Surveyor / Estimator
description:
About BCF Contracting Group

BCF Contracting Group Corporation is an award-winning luxury residential renovation and construction company serving the Greater Toronto Area. Since 2010, we've specialized in high-end condo renovations, full home builds, and custom construction projects that demand precision, craftsmanship, and attention to detail. Our portfolio includes some of Toronto's most prestigious residential properties, and our reputation is built on delivering exceptional results on time and on budget.

The Opportunity

We're expanding our operations and seeking an experienced Quantity Surveyor/Estimator to join our team. This is a key role that will relieve management of estimating and quantity take-off responsibilities, allowing us to scale operations and improve project delivery. You will own all aspects of quantity surveying, material takeoffs, cost estimation, and technical review of construction drawings.

Key Responsibilities

• Conduct detailed quantity take-offs and material estimates from architectural and technical drawings

• Prepare comprehensive project estimates including labour, materials, and overhead

• Review construction drawings for accuracy, completeness, and compliance with Ontario Building Code standards

• Analyze project scope and identify potential issues or cost drivers early in the estimation process

• Support multi-discipline projects including structural, mechanical, electrical, plumbing, and finish work

• Maintain accurate records of estimates, revisions, and project documentation

• Collaborate with project managers, site supervisors, and subcontractors to refine estimates and track actuals

• Support bid development and proposal preparation for new projects

Required Qualifications

• Minimum 5 years of professional estimating and quantity surveying experience in North America

• Strong knowledge of Ontario Building Code (OBC) and relevant construction standards

• Multi-discipline expertise across residential construction including structural, mechanical, electrical, plumbing, and finish trades

• Proficiency with digital takeoff and estimating software (e.g., Bluebeam, PlanSwift, or equivalent)

• Ability to read and interpret architectural, structural, mechanical, and electrical drawings

• Strong attention to detail and accuracy in quantifying and costing projects

• Excellent organizational and time management skills, with ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously

• Professional communication skills and ability to collaborate effectively with diverse teams

Preferred Qualifications

• Experience in luxury or high-end residential renovation and construction

• Knowledge of condo-specific renovation challenges and requirements

• Certification or formal training in quantity surveying or construction estimating

• Experience with construction management software (Planswift, Square takeoff, Clear Estimates & Buildertrend.)

What We Offer

• Competitive salary commensurate with experience

• Opportunity to work on high-profile luxury residential projects

• Supportive team environment with clear growth potential

• Flexible work arrangements and work-life balance

How to Apply

Interested candidates are invited to submit the following:

• Current resume/CV

• Cover letter describing your relevant experience

• Portfolio or examples of past estimates and takeoff work (if available)

I’m looking for a hands-on HubSpot implementation developer to work with me on an ongoing basis.



This is not a strategy or consulting role.

Your core job is to take clearly scoped tasks, ask thoughtful clarification questions when needed, and execute them cleanly in HubSpot.



You’ll be working directly with me. I design the systems and logic. You build them correctly.

description:

The Job: You will produce 6–10 video variations per day. You do not need to film or create videos from scratch. Your job is to take existing winning ads and localize them for new markets using AI tools.

 to auto-generate translated subtitles.

 and ElevenLabs is a big plus (but we will train you).

Nelson

title: VA - AI Image & Video Content Creation (Long-term, Flexible Hours)
description:
We're looking for a reliable and proactive Virtual Assistant to help us produce video content creation by executing prompts on AI image and AI video tools. No editing or creative experience required — everything is documented in step-by-step SOPs (Standard Operating Procedures) that we'll train you on.



What You'll Actually Do



* Run AI image generation prompts (we provide the prompts and the tool — you execute them and save the outputs).

* Run AI video generation prompts the same way.

* Organize and deliver the generated assets following our naming and folder conventions.

* Gradually take on additional small tasks as you grow into the role: thumbnail creation, YouTube scheduling, and other assistant work. We add tasks one at a time, with training for each.



You will NOT need to invent prompts, do complex video editing, or make creative decisions on day one. The work is execution-based and SOP-driven.



Hours & Compensation (Flexible Start)



Starting rate: $2 USD / hour

Initial workload: 4–6 hours per day, depending on volume and how quickly you ramp up.

Expandable to 8 hours per day once you gain traction and we can assign more videos.

Time tracked with Hubstaff (installed on your PC).

Long-term position for the right person. Hourly rate can increase once your speed, quality, and reliability are proven.



Consistency Is Non-Negotiable

We publish multiple videos every single day across multiple YouTube channels. A single missed day disrupts the whole pipeline.



We need someone who shows up daily, on schedule.

Repeated missed work without a valid reason will lead to termination.

We value people who take pride in doing the job well every day, not only when it's convenient.



Requirements



No prior video editing experience needed — but you must be able to follow written SOPs carefully and learn new tools quickly.

Strong sense of responsibility, discipline, and consistency.

Reliable computer and stable internet connection.

Comfortable following English instructions, screenshots, and tutorials.

Willing to use Hubstaff time tracker during paid hours.





To Apply, Please Send:



A short message introducing yourself and why you're interested.

Any prior experience (if any) with AI image/video tools, YouTube, or following SOPs.

Confirmation that you can commit to 4–6 hours per day to start, with availability to scale to 8 hours later.

Confirmation that you're comfortable using Hubstaff.

title: Commercial Construction Project Estimator
description:
Join a commercial construction-related equipment manufacturer and play a key role in preparing accurate estimates and project bids to help them win more business.



This is not just a data entry role. You’ll be expected to think through the details, spot gaps, and make sure everything makes sense before pricing a project. You’ll have ownership of your work and contribute to building clear, accurate, and competitive proposals.



We’re looking for someone detail-oriented, reliable, and experienced in construction bidding who can manage multiple projects at the same time.



Responsibilities:

- Review project plans, specifications, drawings, and scope to understand requirements.

- Develop detailed cost estimates, proposals, and bid submissions.

- Interpret and annotate drawings based on project needs and constraints.

- Handle multiple bid requests simultaneously and meet deadlines.

- Work closely with project stakeholders, including Owners, Project Managers, Superintendents, and Subcontractors.

- Reach out to suppliers and subcontractors to gather pricing and ensure accurate proposals.

- Prepare and communicate complete proposals and estimates based on project requirements.

- Assist in pricing discussions and adjustments to stay competitive.



Requirements:

- 3+ years of experience with commercial construction bidding, whether as a supplier, general contractor, or subcontractor.

- 1+ year WFH experience supporting US-based clients.

- Experience with communicating and negotiating pricing is a major plus.

- Strong English communication skills, both written and verbal.

- Highly organized, detail-oriented, and comfortable juggling multiple tasks.

- Comfortable managing a high volume of bids with accuracy and efficiency.

- Strong communication skills and ability to coordinate with multiple stakeholders.

- Organized, detail-oriented, and able to work independently.

- Must be available to work graveyard hours aligned with U.S. time zones.

- Reliable internet connection and dedicated work-from-home setup required.



Salary and Benefits:

- Base salary: 55,000 PHP per month

- 100% remote / work-from-home

- PTO and paid holidays



When applying, please send your resume link, explain why  you're a good fit. Also, copy and paste this Job ID: recN7dSXXziR82Mlq into your
 response, along with this message: “I’m excited to be applying to Job recN7dSXXziR82Mlq!” This will let us know what job you’re applying for as well as show us that you actually read this entire job description (attention to detail is everything). Thanks and hope to hear from you soon!

title: Experienced Graphic Designer
description:
Freelance Contractor – Design Projects

H.A. Kidd and Company Limited is seeking a skilled freelance contractor to collaborate on design projects. This is a contract-based engagement designed for flexibility and project-based work, not employment.

Responsibilities

• Deliver design work as requested by H.A. Kidd and Company Limited on an as-needed basis.

Required

• The freelance contractor must be highly proficient in Adobe InDesign, Adobe Photoshop and Adobe Illustrator

• The freelance contractor must have the latest Adobe Creative Cloud licence – 2026

• The freelance contractor must have a reliable internet connection and must have a reliable PC or Mac to carry out all the assigned tasks. 

• Maintain open communication and submit timesheets for full visibility of project progress and hours worked. Every invoice must be accompanied with a timesheet describing the job.

• Ensure all completed designs meet required standards and deadlines.

Terms of Engagement

• This role is contractual and does not constitute employment of any kind.

• The contractor is not entitled to leave credits, paid holidays, or any employee benefits.

• There are no fixed working hours; work is performed as projects are assigned.

• The contractor may terminate the engagement by providing notice before he/she takes up the last job, and H.A. Kidd and Company Limited may do the same.

• The contractor will be required to sign a Non-Disclosure Agreement (NDA) to maintain confidentiality.

• The contractor must sign an agreement transferring all design rights for completed work to H.A. Kidd and Company Limited and its Assigns upon completion of each project.

• All contractual terms recognize that this engagement is strictly project-based, with no implications of permanent or salaried employment.

Next Steps

• This role is contractual and does not constitute employment of any kind.

This is a multi-faceted role. Your primary goal is to ensure our senior patients feel heard and understood, while simultaneously managing the complex logistics of 7 mobile nurses to ensure maximum efficiency and minimum travel costs.



Key Responsibilities



1. Patient Communication & Scheduling (Highest Priority)



The "Senior Voice": Answer incoming calls from elderly patients. You must speak slowly, clearly, and with extreme patience, as many of our clients are hard of hearing.



Empathetic Booking: Help seniors navigate their foot care needs and book appointments with our nursing team using our proprietary scheduling app.



Lead Management: Proactively follow up on missed calls and voi
s to ensure every patient is cared for.



2. Strategic Logistics & Route Optimization



Travel Fee Management: Our app automatically calculates travel expenses. Your job is to strategically schedule patients in "clusters" to trigger the lowest possible travel fees for the clients.



Nurse Operations: Assist our 7 mobile nurses in setting their daily "Base of Operations" within the app to optimize their routes and increase their booking capacity.



Proactive Filling: Monitor nurse schedules for gaps. You will reach out to past patients in specific geographic areas to fill empty slots and maximize nurse productivity.



3. Local SEO & Google Business Profile (GBP) Management



Multi-City Management: Set up and optimize Google Business Profile listings for the various cities we serve.



Local SEO Maintenance: Ensure "NAP" (Name, Address, Phone) consistency across all listings.



Review Management: Monitor and respond to patient reviews with a warm, professional tone.



Google Posts: Create weekly updates on GBP to highlight local availability, travel fee discounts, and foot care tips.



4. Niche Social Media Management



Content Execution: Turn provided foot care tips, app improvements, and other content into professional posts for
 and Instagram (3-4 times per week) using Canva.



Engagement: Monitor and reply to community comments and direct messages.



5. Technical QA (As Needed)



App Testing: Act as our internal Quality Assurance tester. As you use the app for scheduling, document any bugs or user-experience issues with screenshots or recordings (Loom).



Requirements



Perfect Verbal Clarity: A neutral, very clear English accent is mandatory. You must be able to adjust your speaking pace for hard-of-hearing seniors.



Logistics Mindset: You enjoy "Tetris-style" scheduling and finding the most efficient way to organize a map.



Local SEO Knowledge: Experience managing Google Business Profiles (claiming, verifying, and optimizing) is a strong plus.



Tech Proficiency: Proficient in Canva, Meta Business Suite, and Google Workspace.



Medical/Healthcare Background: Previous experience in US healthcare admin or medical billing is highly preferred.



Reliability: High-speed internet with a backup power/data plan. Comfortable working the graveyard shift (PST hours).



How to Apply (MANDATORY)



To be considered, you must submit a resume and a 30-second voice recording (Vocaroo or similar) reading the following script:



"Hello! Thank you for calling our foot care clinic. My name is [Your Name]. I see that Nurse Jenny is going to be in your neighborhood this Wednesday. If we schedule you for 2:00 PM, I can actually reduce your travel fee because she is already in the area. Would that work for you?"



Applications without a voice recording will not be reviewed.

title: Web Designer
description:
Job Posting: Web Designer at ProViaXX



ProViaXX is currently seeking a highly skilled and detail-oriented Web Designer to join our growing team. As we continue to expand our digital footprint, we require a professional who possesses the technical acumen to build sophisticated, high-performance websites from the ground up. Unlike designers who rely solely on drag-and-drop page builders, our ideal candidate understands the underlying architecture of the web and is proficient in manual coding.



Role Requirements and Responsibilities

The successful candidate will be responsible for the full lifecycle of web development, from initial wireframing and visual design to the implementation of clean, semantic code. You must demonstrate a mastery of core web technologies, specifically HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript, as these are the foundational pillars of modern web architecture. A deep understanding of responsive design principles is essential to ensure that our digital assets function seamlessly across all devices and screen sizes. Furthermore, you should be comfortable working with server-side scripting and database management, as our projects often require dynamic content integration.



Application Instructions

If you are a self-motivated developer who thrives on solving complex technical challenges and creating intuitive user experiences, we want to hear from you. To apply for this position, please submit your response to this listing. You must include your active WhatsApp number in your reply. Our hiring team will review your qualifications and reach out via WhatsApp to schedule an initial over-the-phone interview. We look forward to seeing your portfolio and discussing how your coding expertise can contribute to the future of ProViaXX.

title: Video Editor | Connect Social
description:
Video Editor | Direct Response & Social Ads



About Connect Social

Connect Social is a performance advertising agency running campaigns across Meta, Google, TikTok, CTV, Spotify, Rumble, and other platforms for a roster of high-profile media brands and direct response advertisers. We move fast, test aggressively, and measure everything by what drives results - not what looks pretty in a reel.



The Role

We're hiring a full-time Video Editor to own the creative production pipeline for our ad campaigns. You'll cut direct response ads, UGC-style content, podcast clips, and social-native video across every major platform. This is a high-volume, high-iteration role. You'll ship dozens of ad variants per week and see the performance data on every one.



This is a full-time role that requires your full attention during working hours. If you're looking to juggle this alongside other freelance work or another full-time job, this isn't the right fit.



What You'll Do

- Edit direct response video ads for Meta, TikTok, YouTube, etc, from raw footage to platform-ready cuts

- Produce rapid variations of winning ads (hook tests, length variations, aspect ratio adaptations) so our media buyers can keep scaling what works

- Cut podcast and long-form content into scroll-stopping short-form clips

- Build UGC-style ads from creator footage, including pacing, captions, b-roll, sound design, and motion graphics

- Collaborate with our Creative Strategist on concepts, scripts, and testing frameworks

- Use performance data to inform future edits - we'll tell you what's working, you figure out how to make more of it

- Maintain an organized project and asset library so the team can move fast without losing work



What We Expect | The Bar

These aren't aspirations. They're the baseline:

- First drafts ship clean. Zero spelling errors, correct captions, correct logos, correct brand assets, clean audio, clean transitions. These are QC items, not creative calls. You proof your own work before anything leaves your desk.

- Revisions are applied in full, on the first pass. When you get a note list, every bullet gets addressed on every video in the batch. If a note is unclear, you ask before exporting - not after.

- Same-day turnaround on short-form. Edits and revisions on videos under 60 seconds turn around the same day. If something legitimately needs more time, you flag it up front so we can plan - we don't find out when it's late.

- Nothing slips. Every request gets tracked and delivered. "It got lost" is not a phrase we want to hear.

- You catch your own mistakes. We shouldn't have to flag the same error twice. If we do, something is broken in your process and we'll expect you to fix it.



What We're Looking For

- 3+ years editing video professionally, with meaningful experience in direct response or social ads (not just brand content or YouTube creator work)

- Fluency in Premiere Pro or DaVinci Resolve, plus After Effects for motion graphics

- A reel demonstrating short-form social ads you can point to and say "this performed." Bonus points if you can share actual metrics

- Strong instincts for hooks, pacing, and retention. You understand why the first 3 seconds matter more than the next 30

- Comfortable with high volume and fast turnaround. You'd rather ship 10 good cuts than polish 1 perfect one

- Obsessive attention to detail on the small stuff - captions, spelling, logo placement, export settings. This is non-negotiable

- Solid captioning, color, and sound design skills

- AI-tool literacy (ElevenLabs, Descript, Runway, Topaz, CapCut, Kapwing, etc.). We lean into these and you should too

- Strong written English for captions and communication with the team



Nice to Have

- Podcast clipping experience (Opus Clip, Riverside, Descript workflows)

- Motion graphics and thumbnail design chops

- Comfort on-camera or directing creators for UGC shoots



This Isn't the Right Fit If...

- You need multiple revision rounds to catch basic errors

- You see same-day turnaround on short-form as aggressive rather than normal

- You're planning to split your hours with another job or heavy freelance load. Unacceptable.

- You prefer polishing one hero piece over shipping a dozen tested variants

- You're looking for a brand-content role where aesthetics matter more than performance



Compensation

Competitive base salary commensurate with experience. We'll talk numbers once we know you're the right fit.



How to Apply

Send the following to 

1. Your reel (link)

2. Your resume

3. A short note (under 200 words) on one ad you edited that performed well - what was the hook, why did it work, and what would you test next

4. Your typical turnaround time on a 30-second ad from brief to first draft, and your process for QC before sending

5. Put "Video Editor — [Your First Name]" in the subject line



Applications missing any of the above won't be reviewed. We read carefully, and we expect the same from you.

title: Marketing Account Manager
description:
We are a US-based marketing consulting company that runs done-for-you
 and Instagram ad campaigns for home-service businesses (painters, foundation repair, concrete coatings, truck repair, remodelers, and more). We are growing fast and need a sharp, client-facing Marketing Account Manager to join our team.



You will work directly under our Marketing Team Lead, learning our systems and processes, with the goal of becoming a full Account Manager handling your own portfolio of clients within 30-60 days.



What you will be doing:

- Managing client communication over Slack. Sending updates, following up on deliverables, answering questions, and making sure every client feels taken care of. Your written communication needs to sound natural, professional, and human. Not robotic, not AI-generated.

- Joining video calls with clients for onboarding, check-ins, and performance reviews. You need to be comfortable on camera with a professional setup and strong English.

- Creating static ad images in Canva. You will design scroll-stopping
 and Instagram ad graphics based on creative briefs from our team. This includes single image ads, carousels, before-and-after graphics, and offer graphics.

- Writing
 ad scripts for video ads (45 seconds long). These scripts need to sound like a real person talking, not like ChatGPT wrote them. You will learn our proven ad framework and write scripts tailored to each client's business.

Following up with clients to collect assets we need. Photos, videos, raw footage, logo files, Meta access, CRM setup. You are the person making sure nothing stalls.

- Building and uploading ad campaigns in Meta Ads Manager based on direction from our team lead.

- Learning GoHighLevel (our CRM) and eventually managing client pipelines, automations, and lead flow.

Reporting on ad performance. Pulling numbers, putting together simple weekly updates, and flagging anything that needs attention.



What we need from you:

- Excellent written and spoken English. This is non-negotiable. You will be writing client-facing messages daily and joining video calls weekly. Your English needs to be fluent and natural.

- Strong Canva skills. You should be able to take a creative brief and produce polished, professional ad graphics without needing constant direction. Send us examples of your work.

- Understanding of Meta Business Suite and
 Ads Manager. You don't need to be an expert but you need to know your way around the platform. If you've run ads before or managed ad accounts, that's a big plus.

- Ability to write ad copy and video scripts that sound like a real person talking. We will train you on our framework but you need to have a natural writing voice. If everything you write sounds like it came from AI, this is not the right fit.

- Good camera and internet for video calls. You will be on client calls regularly. Blurry webcam and choppy audio is not acceptable. Professional setup required.

- Self-starter who can follow SOPs and execute without being micromanaged. We will train you on our systems but once you learn them, we expect you to run with it.

- GoHighLevel experience is a plus but not required. We will train you.



Details:

Full time, 40 hours per week.

Must be available during US business hours (Central Time, GMT-6).

$300/week paid weekly.

Long-term position. We are growing and there is room to grow with us.

Start date: immediately.



To apply:

Send us the following:

A short video (60 seconds max) introducing yourself in English. Tell us about your experience and why you'd be a good fit. This is how we evaluate your English, your camera quality, and your presence on video.

3-5 examples of Canva ad graphics or marketing designs you have created.

A short writing sample. Take this prompt and write a 30-second
 video ad script for a painting company in Dallas, Texas that charges $2,500 for a full exterior paint job and offers a 5-year warranty. We want to see your natural writing voice.

Your Meta Ads Manager experience level (none, beginner, intermediate, advanced).

How soon you can start.

title: Civil Engineer - Land Development
description: Position Description: USA/State of Florida based Engineering office is seeking a Civil Engineer to work on Land Development engineering projects. Candidates should have experience with site civil design and permitting and applicable software applications including site, grading, utility and hydrology modeling programs, storm drainage programs, AutoCAD, and Civil 3D. Projects will include a variety of land development site designs. In addition to strong technical experience, other responsibilities will include research, coordination, cost estimating, permitting for land disturbance and preparation of bid packages as well as technical specifications. Ideally the candidate can work USA EST time zone 8 am - 5 PM EST

Thumbnail or creative direction chops





Process

We're sending raw footage to a handful of editors to cut a 6 to 10 minute YouTube video.

title: Lead/Acquisition Manager - Land investing
description:
Role will receive salary AND commission



Key Responsibilities



- Conduct Call 1s with qualified sellers: anchor pricing using proven frameworks, build rapport, gather remaining property and motivation details, and uncover the seller's target price to assess deal viability.

- Conduct Call 2s: present or refine offers, negotiate final terms, overcome objections, address seller concerns, and close deals by getting purchase agreements signed.

-Ability to reengage older offers

- Review all lead information, due diligence notes, and prior conversation history in Stride CRM before each call to be fully prepared and avoid redundant questions.

- Use Land ID, Land Portal, and supporting tools to verify property details, pull comps, and confirm deal viability during and between calls.

- Structure offers based on BT Land Group's buy box and pricing guidelines—factoring in market value, target spread, close timeline, acreage, and deal size.

- Work closely with the Lead Manager to ensure leads are properly qualified and all necessary information is captured before calls are scheduled.

- Update Stride CRM with detailed call outcomes, negotiation notes, offer details, and deal status after every seller interaction.

- Track personal KPIs including calls taken, offers made, contracts signed, and conversion rates; actively work to improve performance over time.

- Share feedback with leadership on lead quality trends, common seller objections, and market observations to help refine the overall acquisition strategy.



Requirements



- Proven experience in sales, negotiations, or acquisitions—ideally in real estate investing or land (required).

- Strong phone presence: confident, professional, consultative, and able to control the direction and pace of a negotiation call.

- Skilled in negotiation techniques such as anchoring, looping, motivational interviewing, or similar consultative selling approaches.

- Ability to quickly analyze deal economics: market value, offer price, spread, close timeline, and risk factors.

- Comfortable handling objections and guiding sellers through concerns about pricing, process, and timeline with empathy and professionalism.

- Highly organized—able to manage multiple active negotiations at different stages without letting details slip.

- Self-driven, competitive, and results-oriented; motivated by closing deals and exceeding targets.

- Reliable internet connection, a quiet and professional workspace, and availability during U.S. business hours for seller calls.



Preferred Qualifications



- Direct experience in land acquisitions, real estate wholesaling, or land flipping.

- Deep understanding of vacant land valuation: comps, zoning, buildability, road access, utilities, wetlands, flood zones, and slope/terrain analysis.

- Experience using CRM platforms (Stride is bonus) and deal pipeline tracking systems.

- Familiarity with Land ID, Land Portal, or similar property research and due diligence tools.

- Demonstrated track record of closing deals and exceeding acquisition or sales targets in a remote environment.



Compensation & Benefits



- Competitive hourly compensation based on experience and skill level.

- Performance-based bonus structure tied directly to contracts signed, deal volume, and acquisition quality.

- Starts part-time (20–30 hours/week) with a 60-day probationary period. Strong performers will have the opportunity to transition to full-time (40 hours/week).

-Commission will be given after probationary period

- Training on BT Land Group's acquisition process, negotiation frameworks, pricing strategy, and deal structure.

- Significant opportunity for pay growth and expanded bonus potential as deal volume and responsibilities increase.



How to Apply



Interested candidates should submit their resume along with a brief message covering the following:



- A recording of yourself on a call. If you don't have an existing recording, please send a short clip of yourself introducing yourself as if you were speaking to a potential seller for the first time.

- Your favorite food.

- Your relevant experience in sales, negotiations, or real estate acquisitions.



BT Land Group is an Equal Opportunity Employer.
