title: Salesforce Administrator
description:
COMPANY: MVP MAILHOUSE

Located in Park City, UT, MVP Mailhouse is a leader in direct marketing and analytics that drive ROI, specializing in the dental industry. Read more about MVP Mailhouse’s products and services on our website: 
/.



MVP Mailhouse’s flagship product is direct mail marketing with unexpectedly advanced technology. We track all the phone calls and new customer conversations that our marketing campaigns generate for our customers and help them use that data to increase performance. We have started offering digital ad campaigns on Google and
 to help our customers maximize their growth.



MVP Mailhouse uses proprietary technology including native mobile and web-based applications to make our customer experience more streamlined and effective and to help practices achieve their growth goals.



TEAM: PRODUCT and ENGINEERING

Our development team uses kanban and Scru
thodologies to manage our workflow. Our stack is React for web, Node.js back end, Mongo DB, and several REST APIs for other functionality.



The focus of the product and engineering team is building cross-device compatible user interfaces that communicate effectively and make action painless and instinctual. Our entire team is laser focused on understanding our customers’ problems, preferences, and feedback in order to build a product that they love and helps fuel our company’s growth.



POSITION: SALESFORCE ADMINISTRATOR

The Salesforce Administrator will take part in the design, development, and support of the various platforms in the organization. The position will interact with business users, IT resources, and provide advanced in-depth CRM administration and design. The successful hire will support multiple business divisions and collaborate with stakeholders to shape CRM requirements, integration, and ensure alignment with business and IT strategy.



You will also be responsible for designing the system, training employees on the system, troubleshooting software problems, and making improvements to the system over time.



Our system is based on the following software:



- Salesforce

- GSuite (Gmail, Drive, Calendar, etc)

- Quickbooks

- Zapier



RESPONSIBILITIES:

- Help develop and execute the technical roadmap for CRM and system integration, working closely with system users to leverage the platform further to develop and achieve the aim of the CRM and its full integration to the organization’s processes

- Evaluate and configure CRM and other systems

- Training users and creating useful documentation

- Drive user adoption of newly implemented features and functionality; increase the utilization of the CRM through user engagement, develop CRM workflows to support business processes, extract data, produce tailored reports and respond to members’ information requests

- Ensure proper integration of various systems and automation platforms

- Play a strategic consulting role during the planning of various marketing campaigns both at the level of targeting as well as that of business intelligence

- Develop and administer CRM marketing lists, maintaining the data records of all membership engagements and prospective membership including all relevant key contacts, ensuring data supplied is up to date



REQUIREMENTS:

- Bachelor’s degree; preferably in business or technology-related field

- Solid years of professional experience in IT and/or related business experience

- Extensive experience in configuring Salesforce and other CRMs using workflows, validation rules, roles & profiles, reports, and dashboards with demonstrated advanced proficiency

- Proven ability to develop a clear understanding of internal clients’ needs and the capability to incorporate them into processes and solutions

- A good facilitator with a strong personality and relationship management ability to communicate, influence and collaborate with multiple stakeholders



DETAILS TO CONSIDER BEFORE SENDING YOUR APPLICATION:

- REQUIRED WORKINGS HOURS: US business hours (PH night shift)

- Status: Full-time (~40 hrs per week); 8 hours per day excluding breaks

- Candidate must be open to using a time tracking app while working

- Weekend offs

- Location: Virtual team (work from home)



BENEFITS:

- 11 Paid regional/religious holidays per year

- 12 PTO days per year (accrued incrementally with pay periods)

- Healthcare reimbursement for a tea
mber

- 13th-month bonus (prorated by service length)

- Monthly internet reimbursement

- Quarterly performance bonus

title: Full-Stack WordPress Developer and Designer for our Web Design Agency
description:
Company Overview:

We are a stable and longer term Web Design & Digital Agency located in the United States. With a comprehensive suite of services, we aim to save small businesses both time and money. We have over a decade of experience and have garnered stellar reviews from our satisfied clientele. We are on a mission to improve online presence for businesses and are looking for a dedicated individual to join our team and contribute to our vision.



Job Description:

We are looking for a versatile Full-Stack WordPress Developer and Designer to join our team. This role requires a balance of skills in both web development and design. We’re looking for someone with a strong technical skill set who can go beyond design and handle more advanced website functionality. This includes working with WordPress, customizing plugins, implementing integrations, and making code-level adjustments when needed. You'll also be performing website maintenance, and basic hosting management on Plesk.  About 35% of your time will be spent in Web Design, 45% in Development/Technical, and 20% in administrative tasks related to WordPress web design. You'll be working directly with clients in our Helpdesk, so proven customer service and English communication skills are a must.



This is a long-term opportunity to work with a 23 year old web design agency.



You need to have an eye for design and have already established the skills to produce beautiful design work for small business websites and can handle publishing and working with Elementor well to be good at this job.



You must have great organizational skills and decision making abilities. As you will be working with our US design team, you need to have excellent English writing, spelling, and punctuation is a must since you will be working in customer websites.



Our focus is on a quality candidate is your ability, passion, and desire to always improve. We are a fast paced company with a professional and positive environment where our teams work together, roll up their sleeves and pitch in with whatever is needed. You will prioritize your workload to meet deadlines and work objectives.



There is a large opportunity for growth and role expansion as we are a well established digital marketing company and looking to expand our small but talented team of designers and developers.



Experience with Elementor alone is not sufficient without technical problem-solving ability.



Key Responsibilities:



• Build, update, and maintain WordPress websites with a focus on both functionality and user experience.

• Handle technical WordPress tasks including plugin setup, customization, troubleshooting, and third-party integrations.

• Troubleshoot and resolve website issues related to performance, functionality, compatibility, and plugin conflicts.

• Work within WordPress hosting environments, including basic Plesk tasks, domain settings, DNS,
, SSL, and site migrations.

• Make front-end updates and light code-level adjustments using HTML, CSS, and other web technologies as needed.

• Collaborate with clients and internal tea
mbers to implement updates, solve problems, and deliver polished web solutions.

• Respond to client requests and support tickets clearly, professionally, and in a timely manner.

• Help document processes, improve SOPs, and support internal workflows related to website management and development.



Qualifications:



• 5+ years of professional experience in WordPress development and design.

• Proficiency in Elementor and a strong portfolio showcasing your design skills.

• Solid understanding of web development principles, including experience with troubleshooting plugins and website issues.

• Familiarity with web hosting environments, preferably Plesk.

• Excellent organizational skills, attention to detail, and a team-player attitude.

• Fluent in English with strong communication skills.



Benefits:



• Work-life balance with a 35-hour work week.

• Flexible payment schedule and competitive compensation.

• Opportunities for growth and professional development.

• Bonuses, Paid Time Off, Company Holidays, 13th Month.

• Guaranteed raise schedule on base pay.



Ideally, you are:

- Fluent in English and can type quickly

- Comfortable and proficient communicating with American co-workers.

- Proficient with
, Google Workspace, and Slack is necessary.

- Highly organized, timely & reliable.

- Available to work primarily in our time zone, which is EST.



Application Instructions:



Submit your resume and portfolio through OLJ. Please include the phrase "I AM FULL-STACK" in your proposal to confirm you have read the entire job description.

title: Senior Copywriter for Meta Ads Scriptwriting
description:

What we are looking for:

title: Construction Operations Specialist (Roofing)
description:
Join a commercial roofing and construction support team and play a key role in assisting with daily operational activities that help keep service requests, reports, and project coordination running smoothly.



This role is a support-focused position where you’ll help organize information, manage documentation, and assist in handling roofing-related service workflows. Full training will be provided.



We’re looking for someone detail-oriented, proactive, and comfortable working in a fast-paced environment with multiple ongoing tasks.



Responsibilities:

- Review and document work order reports, especially leak-related service calls.

- Prepare and organize roof inspection reports for documentation and internal use.

- Assist in updating and modifying job specifications for future roofing projects.

- Research potential leads using tools such as Google Earth.

- Create simple visual presentations using L
 or similar tools.

- Prepare basic quotes for roof scans, minor repairs, and related services.

- Manage leak call requests and coordinate responses with local roofing contractors, including phone communication as  needed.

- Use Microsoft Excel and Word for tracking, reporting, and general documentation tasks.

- Support general administrative and operational tasks related to roofing services.



Requirements:

- 3+ years of experience in operations, coordination, or administrative support in construction, commercial roofing, or related industries.

- 1+ year WFH experience supporting US or Canada-based clients.

- Strong attention to detail and ability to follow structured processes.

- Highly organized, detail-oriented, and comfortable juggling multiple tasks.

- Strong English communication skills, both written and verbal.

- Proficient in Microsoft Excel and Word.

- Comfortable handling phone calls for coordination and follow-ups.

- Requires working graveyard shifts aligned with US business hours.

- Reliable internet connection and dedicated work-from-home setup required.



Salary and Benefits:

- Base salary: 55,000 PHP per month

- 100% remote / work-from-home

- PTO and paid holidays



When applying, please send your resume link, explain why you're a good fit. Also, copy and paste this Job ID: rechaKejQgmyEryWY into your
 response, along with this message: “I’m excited to be applying to Job rechaKejQgmyEryWY!” This will let us know what job you’re applying for as well as show us that you actually read this entire job description (attention to detail is everything). Thanks and hope to hear from you soon!

title: Social Media Manager & Graphic Designer
description:
About the role

We are a UK-based female fashion brand looking for a talented Social Media Manager with strong graphic design skills to join our team on a part-time basis. You will be responsible for bringing our brand to life on Instagram — creating scroll-stopping content, managing our community, and producing beautiful, on-brand visuals that feel elevated and editorial.

This is a creative role for someone who genuinely loves fashion, understands aesthetics, and can work independently to a high standard.



What you'll do



Plan and manage the Instagram content calendar

Create and edit graphics, carousels, and branded templates using Canva and/or Adobe Creative Suite

Write compelling, on-brand captions with relevant hashtag strategy

Produce and edit short-form video content for Reels

Schedule and publish content consistently

Monitor and respond to comments and DMs

Track and report on performance metrics weekly — reach, engagement, and follower growth

Use AI tools to support content ideation, caption writing, and workflow efficiency

Research trends, competitors, and inspiration to keep content fresh and relevant

Support product launch campaigns and seasonal content planning





What we're looking for



Minimum 2 years experience managing Instagram for a fashion, lifestyle, or luxury brand

Strong graphic design skills — your portfolio should demonstrate a refined, editorial eye

Proficient in Canva (expert level); Adobe Photoshop or Illustrator experience is a strong plus

Comfortable using AI tools such as ChatGPT, Claude, or AI image generation platforms as part of your workflow

Excellent written English with a feel for brand voice and tone

Experience with video editing tools (CapCut, Adobe Premiere, or similar)

Solid understanding of the Instagram algorithm and best practices

Highly organised, self-motivated, and able to manage your own workload independently

Strong attention to detail





Nice to have



Experience in women's fashion, luxury goods, or premium lifestyle brands

Basic photo editing skills (Lightroom or similar)

Experience using AI image generation tools (Midjourney, Adobe Firefly, or similar) for content creation

Experience using a scheduling tool such as Later or Planoly





How to apply

Please include the following in your application:



A link to your portfolio or examples of Instagram accounts you have managed

A brief note (3 to 5 sentences) on why you are a great fit for a fashion brand

Your availability and expected monthly rate in USD



Applications without a portfolio will not be considered.

title: Operations Manager
description:
We're looking for an Operations Manager for our growing DTC brand. You will own the supplier relationship, 3PL coordination, inventory management, freight, QC with manufacturer, and all external operational relationships. You think like a business owner, use technology and AI to work smarter, and are always three steps ahead of the next problem.



What you'll do:

You own the full operational layer of the business end to end. You are the single point of contact

for our supplier, warehouse, freight, and compliance. You think six months ahead, flag problems

before they happen, and always find smarter ways to get things done.



- Own the complete supplier relationship — all communications, payment tracking, production timelines, and capacity planning well ahead of demand

- Track defect rates across every batch, work with the customer service team to identify recurring issues, and report findings back to the supplier to continuously tighten their QC process.

- Manage inventory end to end — build the tracking system, make reorder recommendations with buffer planning, use data and demand signals to plan ahead even with limited history, and always find smarter ways to order and hold stock efficiently

- Own all pre-order management — ensure dates are always accurate and every channel is aligned before anything goes live

- Own the 3PL and freight relationships completely — audit every invoice, monitor fulfillment standards, coordinate large incoming batches in advance, and always looking for ways to improve efficiency

- Coordinate packaging updates with designers — minor changes through the internal team, major changes through our freelance packaging designer

- When new SKUs or accessories are introduced, own the full operational setup end to end — production, certifications, manuals, and packaging all aligned before launch

- Track all compliance certifications proactively — know what is current, what is expiring, and chase anything outstanding before it becomes a problem

- Keep all documentation and legal items organised and up to date — nothing slips through the cracks

- Build SOPs for every repeatable process so the operation is scalable and any future hire can onboard without asking a single question

- Work alongside the CS team to feed recurring product issues back into the supplier relationship and QC process



What we're looking for:

- 5 or more years in ecommerce operations, supply chain, or logistics — the more the better

- Strong end to end supply chain knowledge from overseas supplier through to customer delivery

- Experience managing overseas manufacturers — China experience a strong plus

- Proven experience working with 3PLs and freight forwarders

- Analytical mindset — comfortable reading data, spotting patterns, and forecasting demand even with limited history

- Proven ability to build SOPs and documentation systems from scratch

- Startup or high-growth environment experience — comfortable when nothing is defined



Please send your CV if you met the qualifications

title: Real Estate Financial Modeling & Development Analyst
description:
About Eluvial Academy

Eluvial Academy develops professional-grade educational tools and templates for real estate investors, developers, and traders. Our materials are used in real-world deal analysis, capital preparation, and development execution. We focus on bridging institutional standards with beginner accessibility.

 

Role Overview

Eluvial Academy is seeking a Real Estate Financial Modeling & Development Analyst (Contract) to design and build a comprehensive suite of real estate and crypto education templates. This is a hands-on, execution-focused role for someone with a strong background in real estate finance, development underwriting, and financial modeling.

The ideal candidate has direct experience underwriting deals, structuring capital, and building financial models from scratch—not just reviewing them.

 

Key Responsibilities

Financial Modeling & Underwriting

• Build a Residential Pro Forma Template + User Guide for 1–4 unit, ADU, and small multifamily deals

• Develop a Commercial Pro Forma Template for multifamily, mixed-use, and development projects

• Create a LIHTC / Affordable Housing Analysis Guide to support subsidized and public-private projects

 

Investor & Capital Materials

• Design a professional Investor Pitch Deck Template (.pptx)

• Create a One-Page Deal Summary Template (.docx)

• Develop an Executive Summary Template

• Prepare a Lender / Investor Summary Sheet

• Draft a Joint Venture (JV) Term Sheet Template

• Create a Letter of Intent (LOI) Template

 

Acquisition & Due Diligence Tools

• Develop a Comprehensive Due Diligence Checklist

• Build Expanded Due Diligence Worksheets (zoning, utilities, environmental, legal, financial risks)

• Create a Property Inspection Checklist

 

Development & Construction Tools

• Build a Rehab & Construction Budget Template (hard costs, soft costs, contingencies, draw alignment)

• Create a Gantt Chart Project Schedule Template

• Develop a Commercial Rent Roll Template

• Build a Rent Comps & Market Analysis Worksheet

 

Crypto Education Tool

• Design a Crypto Trade Tracker & Trading Journal Template

• Include trade logging, P&L tracking, risk/reward analysis, and behavioral journaling

• Ensure clear educational disclaimers (non-advisory)

 

Quality Assurance & Delivery

• Ensure all templates are functional, reusable, and clearly documented

• Align templates with Eluvial Academy’s Stan Store bundles:

o Starter Investor Bundle

o Investor-Ready Bundle

o Developer Toolkit

o Crypto Trader Toolkit

• Participate in biweekly progress reviews

 

Required Qualifications

• Strong background in real estate finance, development, or investment analysis

• Proven experience building financial models and pro formas from scratch

• Solid understanding of:

o Residential and commercial underwriting

o Debt sizing, returns, and capital stacks

o Investor and lender expectations

• Advanced proficiency in Excel and/or Google Sheets

• Ability to translate complex financial concepts into clear, teachable tools

 

Preferred Qualifications

• Experience with multifamily or affordable housing (LIHTC)

• Background in real estate development, private equity, lending, or consulting

• Experience creating templates, SOPs, or educational materials

• Familiarity with construction budgeting and development timelines



Contract Details

• Duration: Up to 60 days (early completion allowed)

• Compensation: $1,400 per month, up to $2,800 total

• Structure: Fixed-fee, deliverable-based (not hourly)

• Work Arrangement: Remote, flexible schedule

• Ownership: All work is work-for-hire and owned by Eluvial Academy





Who Should Apply

This role is ideal for someone who:

? Has underwritten real deals

? Understands how investors and lenders think

? Enjoys building clean, structured financial tools

? Can balance institutional rigor with beginner accessibility

 

How to Apply

Submit a brief summary of your experience and examples of financial models or templates you have built (deal details may be redacted).

title: Virtual Creative Assistant
description:
Nuestro Santuario is a faith-rooted lifestyle brand built on the belief that a home is a sanctuary — beautiful, sheltering, and rooted in something deeper. We create content that invites people into that world. We are growing, and we need someone to help us tell the story.



THE ROLE

A part-time creative Virtual Assistant with a strong design eye, a gift for writing, and demonstrated skill with AI-generated graphics, video production, web design, and can use the brand writing style and guidance documents. You will know this brand well enough to carry its voice without being told how.



WHAT YOU WILL DO

— Communicate the Nuestro Santuario brand story and mission clearly across all content

— Create AI-generated graphics and imagery that reflect the brand’s warm, faith-rooted aesthetic

— Produce and edit video content to showcase products and services

— Design branded assets using Canva and the Adobe Creative Suite that will be used on social media and our website

— Write copy that is warm, specific, and unmistakably human



WHAT YOU BRING

— 2–5 years of creative brand, social media, or virtual assistant experience

— A portfolio showing AI-generated imagery and video work that looks intentional, not automated

— Proficiency in Canva and Adobe Creative Suite, as well as AI tools to create images, videos, websites, and brand writing.

— Copywriting ability that captures brand voice without sounding generated

— A natural feel for lifestyle, home, or faith-rooted brands



YOu will need to use 8 Apply Points to qualify for this job.



Send a personal note — not a form letter. Tell us about one piece of work you are proud of and why. Include a portfolio with samples of your AI imagery, video, and copy.  Tell us how your experience would help us with developing our brand and why you would want to work with us.



Our homes are a reflection of what we believe.

We build with people who believe it too.

title: Social Media Manager / Account Owner
description:
Join Our Team as a Social Media Manager/Account Owner

Make an Impact at Content BFF!



Who We Are

Content BFF is a women-owned social media management agency based in South Florida, helping established personal brands and businesses strategically amplify their online presence. We specialize in creating scroll-stopping content rooted in authentic storytelling that drives visibility, builds authority, and generates leads. Our culture is built on excellence, ownership, and bold creativity. We move fast, deliver quality, and celebrate client wins.



Who We're Looking For

We're not looking for "just a social media manager" or "just a video editor." We're looking for an Account Owner who thrives on taking complete ownership of content fulfillment, manages multiple accounts, ensures client success, and brings strategic thinking to every piece of content created.

Creates Quality Content — Your edits are polished, your captions are compelling, and your graphics are on-brand.

Communicates Clearly — You keep clients informed, ask smart questions, and collaborate seamlessly with the team.

Loves Strategy — You don't just post content; you understand how each piece fits into the bigger picture.

Is Detail-Oriented — You catch typos, notice branding inconsistencies, and deliver work that's polished and professional.

Is Growth-Driven — You're always learning, open to feedback, and excited to level up your skills.



…then you might be the Account Owner we've been waiting for.





Position Details

, LinkedIn, YouTube Shorts, and Pinterest



What Makes This Role Exciting

Culture of Excellence: “Good enough” isn’t our standard. We raise the bar together, every project.

Ownership + Flexibility: Work from anywhere, manage your own schedule, and maintain work-life balance while delivering excellence.

Supportive Culture: Work with a CEO who values your expertise, provides clear direction, and celebrates your wins.

What We Expect From You

How We Will Help You Succeed

title: Real Estate Lead Follow-Up & Qualification Specialist (Remote)
description:
***MUST SUBMIT DISC SCORES AND VOICE RECORDING IN ORDER TO BE CONSIDERED***

We are hiring an Inbound Real Estate Lead Follow-Up & Qualification Specialist to handle warm inbound homeowner leads from people actively searching online to sell their homes.



This role exists to filter, qualify, or disqualify leads before they ever reach our acquisition team.



This is not sales, not cold calling, and not persuasion.



If you are comfortable asking direct questions, enforcing clear criteria, and ending calls professionally when a lead is not a fit, this role may be right for you.



What You’ll Be Doing



Respond to warm inbound homeowner inquiries (no cold calling)



Conduct structured qualification calls using a clear scorecard



Ask direct questions about:



motivation



timeline



property condition



decision-maker status



price expectations



Apply qualification rules consistently



Disqualify early when criteria are not met (this is considered success)



Transfer only clean, well-qualified opportunities to acquisitions



Document outcomes clearly in the CRM



You are evaluated on decision quality and discipline, not call volume.



Work Schedule & Availability (Important)



This role requires full-day availability, not just total hours.



Typical schedule:



4–5 hours work



2-hour break



4–5 hours work



Leads come in throughout the day and require timely follow-up.



This role is not suitable if you need a fragmented or flexible schedule.



Who This Role Is For



You may be a strong fit if you:



Are comfortable asking direct questions



Can say “no” calmly and professionally



Prefer clear rules over improvisation



Stay emotionally steady on calls



Document accurately and follow SOPs



Work well independently in a remote environment



Who This Role Is NOT For



This role is likely not a fit if you:



Are looking for a sales or commission-heavy role



Prefer persuasion over qualification



Dislike enforcing rules



Want flexibility instead of structure



Feel uncomfortable disqualifying friendly sellers



Preferred DISC Tendencies (Not Required, but Helpful)



Moderate Dominance (comfortable leading conversations)



Low–moderate Influence (professional, not sales-driven)



Moderate Steadiness (calm, patient)



Moderate Compliance (respects rules and processes)



High-pressure sales personalities are not a fit.



What We Offer



100% remote role



Consistent warm inbound leads



Clear SOPs, scorecards, and expectations



Stable, long-term opportunity for the right fit



Professional, process-driven team environment



How to Apply



Please include a short answer to this question with your application:



“When would you disqualify a seller who sounds friendly but does not meet your criteria?”

title: Real Estate ISA (Part-Time) – Appointment Setter
description:
Part-Time | 20 Hours Per Week



We are looking for a part-time Inside Sales Agent (ISA) to handle outbound prospecting for real estate sellers, specifically expired and withdrawn listings. The primary objective is to generate and set qualified listing appointments.  This is a phone based role that requires strong communication skills and confidence speaking with people.



This role supports operations in Nevada, Georgia, and occasionally Florida.



Compensation

* $300/month base (paid $150 twice monthly)

* $10 bonus per held appointment

* Bonus capped at 15 appointments per month

* Part-time: 20 hours per week (work hours must overlap with daytime hours in the US based on state being worked)





Daily Expectations

* Make outbound calls to expired and withdrawn listings

* ~100 dials per day

* Speak with homeowners to identify motivation and timeline

    * Focus on setting qualified appointments (not just volume)

* Handle objections and guide conversations effectively

* Set qualified listing appointments directly on the agent’s calendar

* Log all activity, notes, and follow-ups accurately

    * Consistent call activity during scheduled hours

* Record call notes and update lead tracking after each conversation

* Follow up with homeowners who are not ready to sell yet



What We’re Looking For

* Experience calling expired or withdrawn listings preferred

* Strong communication and objection handling skills

* Ability to control conversations and confidently ask for the appointment

* Consistent daily dialing and follow-up discipline



Technical Requirements

* Experience using a dialer (specify which when applying)

* Stable internet connection (fiber preferred)

* Backup power (UPS) required

* Headset suitable for phone conversations

* Quiet work environment



Cold calling or phone sales experience is preferred. Real estate experience is helpful but not required.





Contract Term

This role is offered as a month to month contract based on performance for the first six months.

Performance and quality is reviewed monthly for continuance.  At the end of the six month period, performance can be reviewed for:



* increased base compensation

* expanded hours

* additional responsibilities

* Long term work is available for the right candidate.



Application Instructions (Required)

To be considered, you must submit the following:

1. Confirm if you have experience calling expired/withdrawn listings

2. Specify what dialer you use

3. Confirm your internet setup (fiber + UPS)

4. Submit a 30-second voice recording introducing yourself as if calling an expired listing with the script below:

    * “Hi, this is [Your Name] calling on behalf of EJRE with Epique Realty. I noticed your listing on [Address] recently came off the market, and I wanted to see if you still have plans to sell?”

5. Submit a voice recording handling this objection:

    * “I’m not interested in relisting right now.”

6. Submit a voice recording handling this objection:

    * “You’re the 10th agent to call me today, stop wasting my time.”

7. Submit a voice recording asking for the appointment

8. Provide your average daily dial count and weekly appointment numbers from previous roles

title: Product Data Specialist
description:
We’re looking for a Product Data Specialist to own and operate the product information system that sits at the center of a growing real estate and investment organization. This role is about structure, accuracy, and scale. You will be responsible for managing structured data across assets, vendors, and internal systems, ensuring information is clean, standardized, and usable across teams.



You will act as the steward of the PIM platform, working closely with internal stakeholders and external partners to onboard data, enforce standards, and keep everything running smoothly. If you are detail-oriented, process-driven, and comfortable owning a core system end to end, this role is a strong fit.



Why You’ll Want to Join

- You will be paid in USD (bi-monthly: every 15th and 30th)

- Paid Time Off in accordance with company policy

- Observance of Holidays per company guidelines

- 100% remote setup so you can work wherever you feel most productive

- Own a foundational system that supports operations, reporting, and scale

- Work inside a lean, execution-focused team with real ownership and impact



What You’ll Work On

PIM System Ownership and Administration

- Own and manage the Product Information Management platform end to end

- Configure attributes, categories, item types, workflows, and user permissions

- Maintain data standards, validation rules, and completeness requirements

- Serve as the system expert and point of contact for all PIM-related needs



Data Intake, Standardization, and Enrichment

- Receive data from internal teams and external partners

- Standardize, normalize, and enrich incoming data for consistency and usability

- Ensure data accuracy across specifications, descriptions, documents, and assets

- Maintain clear documentation and naming conventions



Data Governance and Quality Control

- Enforce data governance policies and best practices

- Monitor data quality and resolve gaps, errors, or inconsistencies

- Audit records regularly to ensure reliability and completeness

- Own accountability for data accuracy across systems



Syndication, Integrations, and Support

- Manage data outputs to downstream systems and tools

- Troubleshoot data sync, export, or integration issues

- Support internal teams with accurate, up-to-date product and asset data

- Assist with onboarding new data sources, partners, or internal workflows



What You Bring

- 3+ years of experience managing structured data, PIM systems, or database-driven platforms

- Strong attention to detail and a process-first mindset

- Experience administering SaaS platforms with complex data models

- Comfort working with large datasets, attributes, and validation rules

- Clear communicator who can work with both technical and non-technical stakeholders

- Ability to work independently and take full ownership of a core system



Nice to Have

- Experience with PIM platforms, ERP systems, or large internal databases

- Background in real estate, asset management, or operations-heavy environments

- Familiarity with integrations, data exports, or API-based workflows

- Experience supporting sales, operations, or enablement teams with structured data



How to Apply

Please include:

1. Your updated resume

2. A short 1 to 2 minute Loom video introducing yourself and explaining your experience managing structured data systems or platforms



Only candidates who submit a Loom video will be considered.



If you enjoy bringing order to complex data, building systems that scale, and owning the quality of information that teams rely on every day, this role offers real responsibility, autonomy, and long-term impact.

title: Mobile App Full Stack Developer
description:
Senior Mobile App Developer / Full-Stack Developer for Interactive Behavioral Health Education App

Job Overview

We are looking for an experienced mobile app developer or small development team to build a subscription-based educational app for behavioral health interns and newly licensed therapists. The app will include structured learning modules, simple interactive games, quizzes, animated elements, progress tracking, and an admin dashboard for content management.

This is not a design-only role. UX/UI designs and screen concepts will be provided. We need a developer who can take approved designs and turn them into a polished, scalable, production-ready app for iOS and Android, along with the supporting backend and admin tools.

The ideal candidate has experience building interactive educational apps, game-like learning flows, custom animations, backend systems, and subscription/paywall features.



Responsibilities:

Build the mobile app for iOS and Android

Develop the full backend architecture and database

Build admin dashboard/content management system

Integrate subscriptions and/or in-app purchases

Implement user authentication and secure data handling

Implement progress tracking and user stats

Build reusable lesson/game/quiz components so concepts can be added easily

Connect front-end app screens to backend APIs

Optimize app performance

Test across devices

Prepare app for App Store and Google Play submission

Fix bugs and support launch readiness

Potentially provide post-launch maintenance

Required Technical Skills

Mobile Development

Must have experience with at least one of these:

Flutter

React Native

OR native development experience in:

Swift / SwiftUI for iOS

Kotlin for Android

For this type of app, Flutter or React Native is likely ideal because:

one codebase for iOS + Android

good for custom UI

good for animations

more cost-efficient

Frontend / App UI Implementation

Strong experience translating UI mockups into polished app screens

Experience with:

animations

gesture-based interactions

state management

reusable component systems

Backend Development

Experience with one or more:

Node.js

Firebase / Firestore

Supabase

Laravel

Django

AWS backend services

Must be able to build:

APIs

authentication

database structure

admin panel

media/content management

analytics and reporting

Database / Infrastructure

PostgreSQL / MySQL / Firestore / Supabase

cloud storage for videos/images/assets

secure user data architecture

scalable backend structure

Dashboard / Admin Panel

Experience building internal dashboards

CMS or custom content management tools

Role-based access if needed

Payments / Subscriptions

Experience with:

RevenueCat

Apple in-app purchases

Google Play Billing

Stripe if web subscriptions are involved

Media / Content Features

Video embedding or hosting

Audio support

image/content upload systems

QA / Deployment

App Store deployment

Google Play deployment

test builds / staging builds

bug tracking and release process

Nice-to-Have Skills

Experience building edtech, therapy, wellness, or learning apps

Experience with simple game mechanics

Experience with Lottie, Rive, or lightweight app animation systems

Experience with gamification systems like streaks, badges, achievements, and progress maps

Familiarity with accessibility and readable educational UI

Knowledge of HIPAA-aware development principles if any sensitive user data is ever collected

Experience integrating analytics tools like Firebase Analytics, Mixpanel, or Amplitude

Important Product Requirements



The developer should understand how to build:

1. Reusable learning architecture

We do not want custom-coded screens for every concept.

The app should be built so new concepts can be added through the backend using reusable templates.

2. Reusable game framework

The practice game should be reusable across many concepts with different content loaded dynamically.

3. Reusable quiz engine

Questions, answers, scoring logic, and feedback should be manageable from the backend.

4. Reusable progress system

Users should be able to see:

completed concepts

progress by level

quiz scores

mastery percentages

streaks / achievements

Deliverables

The developer or team should be able to provide:

iOS app

Android app

Backend/API

Admin dashboard

Database architecture

CMS/content management system

Subscription/payment integration

Push notification setup

Source code ownership transfer

Documentation

Deployment support

Post-launch bug fix period

title: Remote Cold Caller / Sales Development Representative (SDR ) / BDR / Appointment
description:
About StoryGen

StoryGen (storygen.agency) is a fast-growing B2B lead generation agency helping companies build consistent, scalable outbound pipelines. Our focus is simple: create real revenue opportunities through effective cold outreach.

Cold calling is at the core of what we do. Our BDRs are the front line starting conversations, qualifying prospects, and booking meetings that convert into pipeline.



We work with a wide mix of clients from startups to established companies across SaaS, fintech, IT services, digital marketing, staffing, and consulting. The impact of this role is direct and measurable.



The Opportunity

title: Senior Bookkeeper — QuickBooks Enterprise + QBO | U.S. Wholesale Distributor (Remote, PH)
description:
Senior Bookkeeper — U.S. Wholesale Distributor (Remote, PH)



We’re a U.S.-based wholesale distributor hiring a full-time senior bookkeeper to own our day-to-day bookkeeping & accounting. High volume, multiple entities, real inventory complexity, small fast-moving team.



We need someone who can look at an existing set of books and immediately know what needs to be cleaned up, corrected, and maintained — inventory, sales, returns, bills, vendors, credits, reconciliations, the works. 



Accurate communicative and responsive: replies quickly, asks a quick question instead of sitting on something for days, and flags issues before they become problems.



What you’ll own:

	•	Daily entries across QuickBooks Enterprise (hosted) and QuickBooks Online — sales orders, invoices, bills, payments, vendor credits, sales returns, inventory adjustments etc.

	•	Reconciliations across multiple bank accounts, credit cards, and vendors

	•	Inventory accuracy and product-based accounting

	•	Monthly P&L, balance sheet, and cash flow reports

	•	Proactively surfacing discrepancies, unusual activity, or anything management should know

Requirements:

	•	3+ years bookkeeping experience for U.S.-based clients

	•	Deep, hands-on experience with BOTH QuickBooks Desktop/Enterprise (hosted) AND QuickBooks Online — not surface-level familiarity with one and a crash course in the other

	•	Strong experience with inventory-heavy, product-based accounting: sales returns, vendor credits, bills, inventory adjustments, COGS, shipping etc.

	•	Able to review existing books and identify exactly what’s wrong, what’s missing, and what needs to be corrected — without being walked through it

	•	Excellent written and spoken English; clear, professional communication

	•	Fast response times during your workday — not next-day silence

	•	Comfortable asking clarifying questions rather than guessing or stalling



Must have: dual 24”-27” monitors, high-quality reliable computer, high quality headset, HD webcam, & reliable high-speed internet.



Hours: U.S. Eastern (New York) time zone 10am-6pm



Type: Full-Time, Remote (Philippines)



Compensation: $1,200–1,800/month depending on skill, reliability, and experience. Top of range reserved for candidates with a proven QuickBooks Enterprise + inventory cleanup track record.????????????????



To apply, send:



	1.	Resume

	2.	A short note (3–5 sentences) describing a time you took over messy books and what you found and fixed — specifically around inventory, sales returns, or vendor credits

	3.	Confirmation of your hands-on experience with both QuickBooks Desktop/Enterprise and QuickBooks Online

	4.	Your typical response time to clients during work hours

	5.	Written confirmation that you are not currently working for other clients or employers and that this will be your sole full-time role

	6.	Written confirmation that you are comfortable with Hubstaff time tracking with screenshots



Applications missing any of the above will not be reviewed.????????????????

title: Podcast + YouTube Content Editor (Titles, SEO + Copywriting)
description:
We’re looking for a sharp, detail-oriented content editor to review and refine podcast show notes, episode titles, YouTube titles, and social media copy.



We want someone who understands SEO, but also knows what makes good copywriting. You should know how to turn a decent title into one that feels clear, compelling, engaging, and worth clicking. You understand the difference between flat wording and language that pulls people in.



This is not a “just use AI” role. We are not looking for someone who simply rewrites content with ChatGPT and sends it back. We want someone who uses their brain, has strong judgment, and understands what makes people click, read, and pay attention.



What You’ll Be Doing:

• Review and improve podcast episode titles for clarity, curiosity, SEO value, and click-through potential

• Review and improve YouTube titles with a strong understanding of what drives clicks without sounding forced or generic

• Edit show notes for readability, structure, and SEO optimization

• Refine social media copy so it is more engaging, polished, and aligned with the episode

• Strengthen weak phrasing and make content more compelling while staying true to the brand voice



What We’re Looking For:

• Strong instincts for writing titles and headlines that make people want to click

• A real understanding of good copywriting, not just grammar or basic editing

• Solid SEO knowledge, especially around keyword placement, search intent, and title structure

• Experience editing content for podcasts, YouTube, or other digital media

• Someone who can think critically and make smart editorial decisions, not just rely on AI output

• Strong attention to detail and a high standard for quality



>>>>>>>> If you have a habit of disappearing, missing deadlines, or going silent without communication, please do not apply.



What This Is NOT:

• Not a purely AI-driven role

• Not for someone who only knows how to generate ideas with prompts

• Not a basic proofreading job

• Not for someone who writes vague, generic, low-converting copy



What Success Looks Like:

• Podcast and YouTube titles that are more clickable, more engaging, and more strategically written

• Show notes that are clean, easy to read, and search-friendly

• Social media copy that sounds sharp and actually earns attention

• Content that feels polished, thoughtful, and intentionally written



To apply, please include the following:

• 2 to 3 examples of titles, headlines, or copy you’ve written or improved

• A short explanation of why you think they worked

• Include the word savvy on the first line of your application so I know you have an eye for detail

• Rewrite this sample title to make it more compelling:

“Episode 42: Talking About Marketing Strategies for Podcasts”

• Tell us how you approach the balance between SEO and writing something people actually want to click

• Confirm that you do not have a pattern of disappearing, missing deadlines, or becoming unresponsive, reliability and communication





We’re looking for someone with judgment, taste, and a strong feel for what makes copy work. If you know how to make content sharper, more clickable, and more effective, we’d love to hear from you.

title: GoHighLevel + AI Automation Expert (Credit Repair System Build)
description:
I am building a fully automated credit repair business and need an experienced systems builder to create a complete backend using GoHighLevel, AI, and third-party integrations.



My website is built on Lovable AI, and I need everything connected into a seamless automated system.



What I Need Built:



* Full GoHighLevel CRM setup (pipelines, workflows, automations)

* Integration between Lovable AI website and GoHighLevel (via webhook, API, or Zapier)

* Integration with DisputeFox for dispute processing automation

* Automated SMS/email system for:

    * Client onboarding

    * Appointment confirmations

    * Dispute round updates

    * Completion notifications

* AI integration (OpenAI or similar) for:

    * Lead response and follow-up

    * Client support automation

    * Smart SMS conversations

* Automation of onboarding, payments, and task assignment



Goal:

Create a near hands-off credit repair system where operations are automated and I can scale by only hiring disputers.



Requirements:



* Advanced GoHighLevel automation experience

* Strong understanding of APIs, webhooks, and integrations

* Experience with Zapier or Make

* Experience integrating AI tools (OpenAI preferred)



Preferred / Bonus Experience:



* Experience building systems for credit repair companies

* Experience building systems for business funding or personal funding companies

* Understanding of dispute workflows, client compliance, and credit processes



To Apply:



1. Show examples of automation systems you’ve built

2. Explain how you would connect a website ? CRM ? dispute software ? client updates

3. List tools and integrations you would use

4. Include the word “SYSTEMS” in your application



Innovation & Optimization (Highly Valued):



If you have experience building or improving automation systems beyond the scope listed, I am open to your recommendations.



This includes:



* More efficient workflows or system architecture

* Better integrations between platforms

* Advanced AI automations or improvements

* Automation ideas that reduce manual work even further

* Suggestions to improve client experience, retention, or scalability





If you can bring ideas that improve the system, increase efficiency, or help scale the business faster, this will be highly valued and additional compensation will be provided based on the impact of your contributions.



I am looking for someone who can not only execute but also think and build at a high level.





Bonus:



* Experience with DisputeFox

* Experience building automated credit repair and funding business would be a PLUS



PAY BASED ON EXPERIENCE

description:

title: Sales Representative (Closer / Sales Associate – Overflow Sales)
description:
Company: Core Mind Technology

Supported Brands: Jennings Marketing Solutions, with potential support for other sister companies

Employment Type: Full-time

Work Setup: Remote

Schedule: US hours



About the Role

Core Mind Technology is hiring a Sales Representative (Closer / Sales Associate) to support inbound and outbound sales efforts across our marketing agency and related brands. This role focuses on handling qualified sales conversations, running discovery and closing calls, and moving opportunities through the pipeline with strong follow-through and documentation.

This position is ideal for a confident communicator who is comfortable leading sales conversations, qualifying prospects, and closing deals while working closely with a distributed team.



Key Responsibilities

Sales & Client Acquisition

- Handle inbound sales calls and follow up with warm and qualified leads

- Conduct outbound prospecting when needed via calls,
, and social follow-ups

- Schedule, confirm, and run discovery and sales calls

- Qualify prospects based on needs, budget, timeline, and decision-makers

- Clearly explain service offerings and value propositions

- Address objections and guide prospects toward close



Pipeline & Process Management

- Maintain accurate records of calls, notes, and outcomes in the CRM

- Ensure timely follow-ups and smooth handoff to onboarding or fulfillment teams

- Coordinate with internal tea
mbers to ensure proposals are created and delivered

- Follow the established sales process consistently



Collaboration & Communication

- Attend required sales meetings and scheduled sales calls

- Coordinate with tea
mbers on active deals and next steps

- Work with the retention and renewals workflow team to support long-term client success

- Ask for support or guidance from leadership as needed



Performance Expectations based off 20 call per week

Weeks 1 and 2:

- Learn the offer assigned and perfect your sales flow

- Target at least 60% advance to a second call if not closed

- Target 2 total closed deals in your first 2 weeks

- Performance below expectations will be supported with coaching, call reviews, and process adjustments



Weeks 3 and 4:

- Target at least 70% advance to a second call if not closed

- Target at least 2 closed deals per week (4 total)

- Learn a new offer after 20% close ratio is maintained for 2 weeks

- Performance below expectations will be supported with coaching, call reviews, and process adjustments



Weeks 5 through 8:

- Target 80% advance to a second call if not closed

- Target 3 - 5 closed deals per week

- Learn a new offer after 20% close ratio is maintained for 2 weeks on all offers trained on

- Performance below expectations will be supported with coaching, call reviews, and process adjustments



Weeks 9 through 12:

- Target 80% advance to a second call if not closed

- Target 3 - 5 total closed deals

- Learn a new offer after 20% close ratio is maintained for 2 weeks on all offers trained on

- Work with leadership to funnel the offers with higher close ratio to applicable tea
mbers.

- Performance below expectations will be supported with coaching, call reviews, and process adjustments



What We’re Looking For

- Experience in hight ticket sales, closing, appointment setting, or client acquisition

- Strong phone and zoom presence and confidence leading sales conversations

- Organized, reliable, and consistent with follow-ups

- Ability to quickly learn offers and communicate value clearly

- Comfortable suggested improvements to leadership to improve processes

- Self-driven and comfortable working remotely



Nice to Have

- Experience selling marketing services, AI systems, consulting services, and Software

- Familiarity with Close CRM, Slack, Notion, and Asana

- Experience with Zoom, Google Meet, calendars, and basic reporting



Compensation & Incentives

- Base Pay: Up to $400 monthly salary (paid for completing required daily, weekly and monthly SR duties and follow up activities) {SRs who fail to complete 3 weeks of tasks and requirements will not qualify for base pay}

- Paid Time off for all 18 Philippines Holidays (If all SDI activities are completed or on track)

- Unlimited Paid Time Off (If all SDI activities are on track, completed or able to be reassigned) {Unless Abused}



Commissions Offerings

- 10% on first month revenue closed and 3% on first months two through six of revenue collected (if client is retained)



Performance Bonus Opportunities:

- Bonuses based on retention of closed sales

- Bonuses based off number of close sales per month



Benefits after 90 days with the company:

- Company Funded Healthcare Plan

- Company Funded Macbook Air/Pro

- Company Funded Battery Back Up System (To prevent/minimize interruptions during power outages)

- Company Funded Internet Service

- Profit Share Pool Qualification



How to Apply

Please submit:

- Your resume or LinkedIn profile

- A short introduction (2–5 sentences) highlighting your sales experience

- Optional: a short voice note or video introduction

Bonus Opportunities:

Graduation Incentives (Assuming transition to a full time role):

- Company Funded Macbook Air/Pro

- Company Funded Battery Back Up System (To prevent/minimize interruptions during power outages)

How to Apply

title: Graphic Designer
description:
About the Role



We at JVDB Studios are looking for a Graphic Designer who can bring our commercial story to life through compelling visual assets. This role focuses on creating high-impact sales and marketing materials that not only look visually strong but also drive conversions.



You will work closely with our sales and marketing teams to translate complex ideas into clear, persuasive, and engaging visuals. This is a role for someone who understands that design is not just about aesthetics, but about communication and results.



What You’ll Do



You will design and optimize pitch decks, one-pagers, case studies, proposals, and other digital assets that support sales and marketing initiatives. You will be responsible for turning raw ideas and messaging into polished, professional visuals that align with our brand and improve how we present to clients. Part of your role will also involve improving existing materials to make them more effective, clearer, and more conversion-focused.



What We’re Looking For



We are looking for someone with proven experience in graphic design, particularly in creating sales and marketing materials. You should have a strong portfolio that clearly demonstrates your ability to produce high-quality, professional work. A strong eye for layout, typography, and branding is essential, along with the ability to simplify complex information into visually engaging content.



You should be comfortable using tools such as Adobe Creative Suite, Figma, or similar platforms, and be able to work independently while delivering on time.



Important Requirement



We are specifically looking for candidates with proven experience and strong samples of work. Your portfolio is a key part of your application and should showcase real projects that demonstrate your design capability and effectiveness.



Engagement Details



This is a freelance contractor role with pay structured per project, depending on scope and experience. The schedule is flexible, and the role is fully remote.



Why Join JVDB Studios



You will be working with a fast-growing and creative team, with the flexibility to manage your own time and the opportunity for ongoing projects. This role also offers direct collaboration with a European company and exposure to impactful commercial work.



How to Apply



Send your resume, portfolio, and live project links to:







Subject line: JVDB GRAPHIC DESIGNER

title: 24 HR Review | VA Remote Virtual Receptionist
description:
Important: Our application process moves quickly. If you are selected to proceed to the next interview stages, you must be able to respond promptly. Candidates who do not respond in a timely manner may be passed over.



We are currently seeking a Remote Spa Receptionist to manage inbound calls and book spa appointments. This is a long-term, performance-based position. Calls are recorded and reviewed regularly. Continued placement in this role depends on accuracy, professionalism, booking success, reliable attendance, no missed calls during scheduled shifts, quick response times, and the ability to professionally manage complaints and de-escalate dissatisfied clients.



To apply: Please copy the questions below, paste them into your reply, and answer each question thoroughly.



(1) Location & Utilities: Where in the Philippines are you currently located? How often have you experienced power or internet outages in the past year? Do you have backup solutions (e.g., generator, mobile hotspot) to ensure your work is not affected?



(2) Home Setup: Will you be working from home? Is your workspace quiet and suitable for handling calls? Do you have your own computer or laptop? Please attach a screenshot of your current internet speed.



(3) Availability & Speed: Can you consistently work seven days a week, six hours per day, and remain available for the full shift without missed calls? How quickly do you typically answer inbound calls? What is your current typing speed in words per minute?



(4) Call & Complaint Experience: Describe your experience with answering inbound calls, booking or scheduling appointments, customer service, following scripts, and handling complaints. Provide one real example of how you de-escalated an upset client and the outcome.



(5) Tools & Systems: What programs, tools, phone systems, or VoIP platforms have you used for handling calls? Do you have any issues with background noise, power outages, or internet interruptions? How do you take notes and log client interactions during calls?



(6) Voice Recordings: Please submit two short voice recordings. Recording one should demonstrate booking an appointment from 7:00 PM to 8:00 PM with a total amount of $60. Recording two should demonstrate handling a double charge for a 90-minute massage where the client sees two $90 charges and is requesting a refund. Your tone should be calm, polite, and professional.



(7) Current Job: Do you currently have another job? If yes, where, how many hours per week, and what are your roles and tasks in that job?



(8) Schedule, Pay & Start Date: Are you able to work seven days a week, six hours per day, during Central Standard Time (CST) hours without conflicts? What is your expected hourly or monthly rate? What is your earliest physical start date if hired?



(9) Marketing, Design & Video: Do you have experience with online marketing, creating content using Canva, or producing short video clips such as
 Reels or similar platforms? Please describe your skills and provide samples of your previous work if available.



(10) Fit, Skills & Experience: Briefly introduce yourself and explain why you would be a good fit for this role. Include what you believe is most important when handling spa clients over the phone, especially during complaints, and what other skills or areas you have a lot of experience in.

title: Project Manager
description:
Job Title: Project Manager (PMP Certified - not mandatory)

Company: Lyfe Hardware LLC (
)

Location: Remote

Schedule: Flexible but EST Overlap Required

Experience: 10-12 Years

Industry: E-commerce, Architectural Hardware

Compensation: Competitive (based on experience)



About Lyfe Hardware

Lyfe Hardware is a fast-growing US-based ecommerce brand in the home improvement and architectural hardware category. We focus on combining great design, seamless operations, and high-quality customer experience. 

As we continue scaling across channels like Shopify, Amazon, and major marketplaces, we’re seeking an experienced Agile Project Manager to provide clear leadership, drive strategic initiatives, and establish project frameworks that enable teams to deliver with speed and discipline.





Role Overview

The Project Manager will own the end-to-end project lifecycle, drive cross-functional alignment, and ensure the smooth execution of initiatives across ecommerce, operations, marketing, catalogue, and product teams. This role requires a highly structured thinker, strong communication, a deep understanding of P
thodologies, and hands-on leadership in a fast-scaling environment.

This person will be reporting directly to the founders. It is also a leadership role.



Key Responsibilities

???? Project Leadership & Execution

Lead planning, execution, and delivery of company-wide projects across ecommerce, fulfilment, catalogue, and product functions.

Build clear project scopes, timelines, requirements, and communication plans from zero.

Define project milestones, prioritise tasks, mitigate risks, and unblock teams in real time.

Conduct cross-functional stand-ups, sprint planning, and retrospectives using Agile methods.

???? PMO & Process Ownership

Build standardised PM frameworks, templates, and project governance processes from scratch.

Establish reporting structures, dashboards, and tracking mechanisms for leadership visibility.

Develop and maintain project documentation and improve existing SOPs.

Implement best practices aligned with PMI standards.

???? Cross-functional Collaboration

Coordinate across ecommerce, operations, catalogue, logistics, creative, and support teams.

Translate business goals into actionable project plans with clear ownership.

Ensure cross-team communication remains transparent, consistent, and deadline-driven.

???? Tools, Automation & Efficiency

Manage projects through Asana or similar PM tools.

Identify workflow inefficiencies and recommend automation opportunities (Zapier, Make, AI tools, N8N).

???? Stakeholder & Leadership Management

Partner directly with founders and department heads to prioritise initiatives.

Provide weekly project status updates, risk logs, and execution insights to leadership.

Manage internal contributors, contractors, and cross-functional project squads.

???? Quality, Risk & Delivery Assurance

Anticipate risks and proactively build mitigation plans.

Ensure every project is delivered on time, within scope, and aligned with business goals.

Maintain strict version control and change management practices.



What We’re Looking For

Must-Haves

10+ years of experience in project management, PMO, or cross-functional leadership roles.

PMP certification (mandatory).

Proven success in E-commerce, or marketplace experience (Shopify, Amazon, Wayfair, Walmart).

Strong experience building PM structures, SOPs, and governance systems.

Expertise with PM tools (Asana preferred).

Excellent communication, documentation, and stakeholder management skills.

Experience coordinating remote teams across time zones.

Solid understanding of Agile methodologies (Scrum, Kanban).

Bonus Points

Exposure to automation tools (Zapier, Make, AI platforms).

Experience working with catalogue, product development, or creative teams.

Background in startups or high-growth companies.



Tools You’ll Use

Project Management: Asana, Notion

Automation: Zapier, Make, n8n, ChatGPT

Communication: Slack, Loom, Google Workspace

E-commerce Ecosystem: Shopify, Amazon Seller Central, ERP/OMS tools



Why Join Lyfe Hardware?

Work directly with founders in a high-ownership, impact-first environment.

Help build a scalable framework for an international ecommerce brand.

Fully remote role with flexibility and autonomy.

Clear expectations, zero micromanagement.

Fast-paced environment where your contributions directly shape business outcomes.

title: Senior Design Engineer
description:
Job Description: Technical Design Engineer (Architectural Hardware)

Location: Remote

Industry: Architectural Hardware / Manufacturing

Work Schedule: 9:00 am – 5:00 pm EST

About Us

We are a fast-growing company specializing in high-quality architectural hardware — including railings, Lucite/Acrylic, iron door handles, and fully custom-designed products. Our work spans both standard and bespoke projects, with a focus on precision engineering, manufacturing efficiency, and design innovation.

Position Overview

We’re looking for a skilled Technical Design Engineer with deep experience in architectural hardware and direct exposure to US-based clients or companies. This is a full-time, remote role ideal for someone with 7+ years in product or technical design, strong communication skills, and comfort working independently across global teams.

???? Please note: You will be required to use your own laptop or desktop with reliable internet and CAD capabilities.

???? Prior experience working directly with US clients is mandatory.

Key Responsibilities

???? Product Design & Engineering

Create detailed CAD drawings and 3D models (AutoCAD, Inventor, SolidWorks, etc.)





Ensure all designs meet structural, functional, and aesthetic standards





Conduct basic stress/load analysis to validate product strength





Design for cost-effective manufacturing (e.g., casting, CNC, stamping)





???? Estimation Support

Assist in preparing design-based estimations for custom or large-scale projects





Coordinate with internal and factory teams to align on feasibility and cost drivers





???? Technical Documentation & Factory Coordination

Create and maintain BOMs, assembly instructions, and tolerance specifications





Collaborate with factories to resolve production-related design queries





Ensure accuracy and version control across all design files





???? Custom Order Engineering

Create or adapt drawings based on US client-specific dimensions or configurations





Engineer custom solutions ensuring proper load distribution and installation feasibility





Provide technical clarification during sales or execution, as needed





???? New Product Development 

Occasionally assist with prototyping and detailing of new product ideas





Translate rough concepts into basic technical drawings or sketches





Must-Have Qualifications

Bachelor’s degree in Civil, Mechanical, or Industrial Design Engineering





Minimum 5 years of relevant experience (hardware, furniture, metalwork, etc.)





Strong proficiency in AutoCAD, Inventor, SolidWorks, or similar tools





Familiarity with fabrication techniques (metal, Lucite/acrylic, wood, glass)





Ability to independently manage drawings, specs, and technical communication





Prior experience working directly with US-based clients





Fluent in English (verbal & written)





Must have your own system + stable internet suitable for CAD work





Bonus Points For:

Experience preparing cost/effort estimates





Exposure to sales or client-facing technical support





Experience with factories or vendors for custom fabrication





Knowledge of NPD workflows and design iteration





What We Offer

Competitive pay (based on experience)





Flexible, fully remote work environment





Ownership over diverse and high-impact projects





Collaborative, execution-focused culture





Long-term growth potential within a growing product + ops team



Please fill out this form to expedite your hiring process

title: Customer Support Executive (American Accent)
description:
Customer Support Specialist (American Accent) – eCommerce Team



Overview:

Lyfe Hardware is seeking a dedicated and customer-focused individual to join our growing eCommerce team. As a Customer Support Specialist, you will play a crucial role in ensuring a seamless customer experience for our online hardware fittings and railing business. This role involves direct interaction with customers and distributors, addressing inquiries, resolving issues, and supporting backend eCommerce operations. We are looking for someone with a strong technical background and a genuine passion for delivering outstanding customer service.



Location: Remote



Primary Responsibilities:

Customer Support: Provide exceptional customer service via phone,
, and chat, addressing inquiries about products, order status, pricing, and availability.

Problem Resolution: Efficiently solve customer and distributor issues, ensuring the best possible outcomes while maintaining high levels of customer satisfaction.

Order Management: Handle order processing, listing creation, optimization, and inventory management across multiple eCommerce platforms.

Product Expertise: Develop deep knowledge of our products and customer needs to offer tailored solutions and enhance the overall customer experience.

Distributor Support: Assist distributors with backend eCommerce systems and order processing, ensuring smooth operations and timely responses.

Continuous Improvement: Report and track online issues, providing feedback for continuous improvement of customer service processes and the overall user experience.

Trend Analysis: Participate in tea
etings, presenting insights into customer trends and making actionable recommendations for service enhancements.

Market Research: Conduct market research to gather customer insights, supporting the team in identifying new opportunities and areas for growth.

Sales Support: Assist with B2B sales efforts, providing support where needed to drive business growth.

Adaptability: Show willingness to learn new skills and take on additional responsibilities as the role evolves.



Minimum Requirements:

American Accent: Must have a natural or neutralized American accent with availability to work from 9 am to 5 pm EST.

E-commerce Experience: Prior experience in a direct digital commerce role is required. Familiarity with platforms like WooCommerce, Amazon Seller Central, and Etsy is highly desirable.

Technical Background: A technical degree in civil engineering or a related field is preferred, given the technical nature of our products (e.g., railings and builder hardware).

Software Proficiency: Working knowledge of Microsoft Office (Word, Excel), Google Drive, and productivity tools such as Notion, Trello, and Slack.

Problem-Solving Skills: Strong analytical abilities with a proven track record of effective problem-solving.

Communication Skills: Excellent interpersonal and communication skills, with the ability to build strong relationships with customers and tea
mbers.

Accuracy and Efficiency: Demonstrated ability to work with a high degree of accuracy and urgency in a fast-paced environment.

Organizational Skills: Strong multitasking and organizational abilities, ensuring tasks are prioritized and deadlines are met.

Collaborative Spirit: Able to build and maintain strong, collaborative relationships with customers and internal teams.

Flexibility: Willingness to take on new responsibilities and adapt to changing business needs.



Benefits:

Competitive Salary: A competitive compensation package based on experience and qualifications.

Work-Life Balance: Flexible work hours with the opportunity to work remotely from the comfort of your home.

Professional Growth: Opportunities for continuous learning and professional development within a growing company.

Inclusive Culture: A collaborative and supportive work environment where your ideas and contributions are valued.



About Lyfe Hardware:

Lyfe Hardware is a rapidly growing eCommerce business specializing in high-quality architectural hardware, including railings, Lucite/Acrylic, iron door handles, custom-built hardware, and more. We pride ourselves on innovative marketing, exceptional customer service, and operational efficiency.

title: Technical Design Engineer
description:
Job Description: Technical Design Engineer (Architectural Hardware)



Location: Remote

Industry: Architectural Hardware / Manufacturing



About Us



We are a fast-growing company specializing in high-quality architectural hardware including railings, Lucite/Acrylic, iron door handles, and fully custom-designed hardware. Our work spans both standard and bespoke projects, and we prioritize precision engineering, manufacturing efficiency, and design innovation.



Position Overview



We’re looking for a skilled and experienced Technical Design Engineer with a strong background in architectural hardware and new product development (NPD). This role is ideal for someone with at least 5 years of experience in product design and engineering, particularly in hardware or related sectors.



The candidate should be able to independently generate factory-ready technical drawings, validate load-bearing aspects of their designs, and collaborate effectively with production teams for smooth handover to manufacturing.



Key Responsibilities

???? Product Design & Engineering



Create detailed CAD drawings and 3D models (AutoCAD, Inventor, SolidWorks, etc.) for new and existing architectural hardware products







Ensure designs meet structural, functional, and aesthetic standards







Conduct basic load-bearing and stress analysis to validate design strength







Design with consideration for cost-effective manufacturing, including casting, stamping, CNC machining, and other relevant processes







???? New Product Development (NPD)



Support the conceptualization, prototyping, and detailing of new product lines







Translate product ideas into manufacturable technical designs and production-ready documentation







Iterate on designs based on test feedback, feasibility checks, or customer inputs







???? Technical Documentation & Factory Coordination



Prepare and maintain assembly instructions, technical specifications, BOMs, and tolerance standards







Serve as a key technical point of contact for factory teams, helping resolve design-related queries during production







Ensure proper version control and drawing accuracy across all files







???? Custom Order Engineering



Create or adapt drawings for custom orders based on client-specific dimensions or configurations







Ensure all custom solutions are engineered with sound load distribution and installation feasibility







Support client-facing teams with any technical clarifications needed during sales or execution phases







Qualifications



Bachelor’s degree in Civil, Mechanical, or Industrial Design Engineering







Minimum 5 years of experience as a Design Engineer in architectural hardware, metalwork, furniture, or related manufacturing fields







Proficiency in AutoCAD, Inventor, SolidWorks, or similar CAD tools







Strong understanding of structural loads, support systems, and mechanical connections







Familiarity with metal, glass, and wood fabrication techniques







Excellent communication and documentation skills







Highly organized, reliable, and solution-oriented







Preferred Qualifications



Hands-on experience with new product development (NPD)







Prior experience with custom fabrication and manufacturing coordination







Exposure to client communication or technical support in a hardware/product environment







Ability to work independently with remote teams and across time zones







What We Offer



Competitive compensation based on experience







Flexible remote working environment







Opportunities to work on diverse and high-impact design projects







Collaborative team culture with a focus on quality and execution







Long-term growth potential across technical and operational roles
